Monster Mage.name: 怪物法师 Monster Mage
Monster Mage.text:
法师在高塔里研读布满灰尘的古籍，术士则依靠与生俱来、流淌在血脉中的力量，但你开辟了不同的道路。你在世界各地寻找怪物并击败它们，以学习它们的法术。若你能斩杀足够多的怪物，你的收藏或许会增长到其他任何施法者都无法想象的程度。

你魔法的基础，是一种神奇的流程：从被杀死的敌人身上制作标记，以学会它们能施放的某个法术。每个标记只储存一个法术，而当你收集到更多标记时，你的魔法多样性也会随收藏一起增长。你的标记只对你生效，只要它们仍在你身上，就会散发淡淡的蔚蓝辉光。正因如此，那些不了解成为怪物法师流程的人，看到这抹蓝光并误以为它是魔法来源时，有时会错把怪物法师称作“蔚蓝法师”“天青法师”等类似称号。

没有人能确切知道怪物魔法的研究究竟始于何处、始于何时，但它是一段高度个人化的旅程。其基本原理需要传授——无论是来自导师的教导，还是借助书籍自学——但除此之外，要由你自己去学习怪物所能提供的魔法。怪物法师通往力量的道路并不总是线性的：每当有一位怪物法师热衷于通过危险的冒险来增长纯粹的力量，便会有另一位怪物法师消失在荒野中，有条不紊地击败弱小怪物，直到带着无数法术的知识归来。

怪物法师变体与“以怪物材料进行制作”的体系协同良好：反正你本就有充足动机去狩猎怪物；取得你想要的东西并不会降低怪物材料的价值；而追踪怪物掌握的法术也很有用——无论是对你，还是对想要添加“注法属性”的人而言皆是如此。

怪物标记

作为怪物法师，你的标记收藏既个人化又至关重要，正如法师的法术书或女巫的魔宠一般；你与标记的力量相通，以此准备你的法术。因此，你的标记可以像怪物法师之间的习俗与惯例那样千变万化。若你专注于“眼睛是通往意志、亦是通往魔法的路径”这一理念，你或许会把各种生物的眼睛封存于琥珀之中，作为你的标记。相反，若你更在意生物如何通过其外层身体汲取周遭世界的环境魔法，你可能会用鳞片、甲片、羽毛、外骨骼碎片、毛簇或皮肤制作标记。

你在制作标记方面的习俗由你决定。然而，若你的小队里有多个人在扮演怪物法师、遗蜕猎人，或其他可能对自己能回收生物哪些部位极其在意的角色，请务必协调，以确保你们不会彼此阻碍从同一只生物制作标记、遗蜕或其他道具。举例来说，如果另一位玩家扮演的怪物法师使用生物的眼睛制作标记，你大概就不该也选择使用眼睛，或选择包含眼睛的东西（例如完整无损的整颗头颅）。一般而言，你使用的生物部位越多，就越可能产生冲突，因此做决定时请牢记这一点。归根结底，你始终可以让你的角色在制作标记的习俗上保持弹性，以配合队伍的需求；不论你用什么，魔法效果都同样有效，而且许多怪物法师（如扎拉）会将各种类型的标记混搭使用。

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.ZnOMjuTmAus26JEs]{怪物法师奉献} 专长 2

先决条件 你必须击败一只拥有天生戏法的怪物，并保存其一部分以制作你的第一个标记

你已通过击败一只怪物并制作一个标记，完成成为怪物法师的流程。标记是一种由怪物的一部分制成的小型魔法容器，使你能够储存该怪物的魔法。为满足先决条件，从你击败的怪物所拥有的天生戏法中选择一个；你从那只怪物的身体制作一个包含该戏法的标记，并使用该怪物施放时的同一种根源。记录怪物的种类、该法术、该根源，以及对标记外观的简短描述。你通过从标记中准备法术来施放它们；这些标记来自你击败的怪物，并通过“制作标记”行动获得。你的标记只对你生效，你不能与其他施法者分享法术（即使是其他怪物法师也不行），也不能使用“学习法术”行动来学会更多怪物法师法术。你获得 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Cast a Spell]{施法（行动）} 动作。你每天至多可从标记所储存的法术中准备两个戏法（不过你起初只有一个，直到你再击败一只拥有不同天生戏法的怪物为止）。无论这些法术属于何种根源，你都在从标记中施放的法术的法术攻击掷骰与法术DC上受训，但你不会在你施放的其他法术的法术攻击掷骰与法术DC上变为受训。你的怪物法师变体法术的关键施法属性为感知；当你施放它们时，它们是以法术位施放的怪物法师法术，而非天生法术。你获得“额外学识”技能专长，并且必须选择一个与怪物相关的学识（技能）。你还获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-actions.YUteSwXyhoAe63IN]{制作标记} 行动。

特殊 在你从怪物法师变体获得另外两个专长之前，你不能选择另一个奉献专长。

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.UzPMJxEwjZc9A4qD]{基础怪物法师施法} 专长 4

先决条件 怪物法师奉献

你获得一个1环法术位，可用来从你的标记中准备怪物法师法术。在6级时，你获得一个2环法术位。在8级时，你获得一个3环法术位。当你从标记准备一个法术时，你可以升阶该法术（或者若该生物的天生法术被升阶到高于最低环级，则你可以降低其环级）；你不必以该生物当初施放的同一法术环级来施放。若你希望在一天中施放同一法术多次，你可以从同一个标记多次准备该法术。

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.zMDF1bft6hZyo245]{以其人之道还治其人之身} 专长 6

先决条件 怪物法师奉献

由于将你与标记连接起来的交感魔法，你的法术对你用来施放它们的标记所属生物尤为有效。每当你对“与你用来准备该法术的标记所来自的生物种类完全相同”的生物施放一个怪物法师法术时，你的目标在对抗该法术时，其AC与豁免承受-2状态减值。由GM裁定，若该生物非常相似但并非同一种（例如拉米娅与拉米娅女族长可能足够相似，但仅仅都同为恶魔的两种生物则未必），则目标在对抗该法术时，其AC与豁免可能承受-1状态减值。

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.S3V7RhtH4RZdAZ7y]{怪物广度} 专长 8

先决条件 基础怪物法师施法

你每天能施放更多怪物法师法术。对于除你最高的两个怪物法师法术位之外的每个法术环级，你从怪物法师变体专长获得的法术位数量各增加1。

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.w0VaJ15hGhLsq4TJ]{专家怪物法师施法} 专长 12

先决条件 基础怪物法师施法

无论这些法术属于何种根源，你在从标记中施放的法术的法术攻击掷骰与法术DC上成为专家，但你不会在你施放的其他法术的法术攻击掷骰与法术DC上成为专家。你获得一个4环法术位以施放怪物法师法术。在14级时，你获得一个5环法术位；在16级时，你获得一个6环法术位。

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.I4lVxH2Uf5orzpJX]{大师怪物法师施法} 专长 18

先决条件 专家怪物法师施法

无论这些法术属于何种根源，你在从标记中施放的法术的法术攻击掷骰与法术DC上成为大师，但你不会在你施放的其他法术的法术攻击掷骰与法术DC上成为大师。你获得一个7环法术位以施放怪物法师法术。在20级时，你获得一个8环法术位。

Wizards study dusty tomes in their towers and sorcerers rely on the power they were born to running through their blood, but you forge a different path. You search the world for monsters and defeat them to learn their spells. If you can slay enough monsters, your collection might grow larger than anything those other spellcaster can imagine.

The basis for your magic is a magical process of creating tokens from slain foes to learn one of the spells they could cast. Each token stores a single spell, and as you collect more tokens, the versatility of your magic grows with your collection. Your tokens only work for you, and as long as they remain in your possession, they glow with a faint azure hue. Due to this fact, those who don't understand the process of becoming a monster mage who see the blue glow and think that is the source of the magic sometimes mistakenly call monster mages "azure mages," "cerulean mages," and other such titles.

No one is sure precisely where or when the study of monster magic began, but it's a highly personal journey. The basic principles require teaching, whether from a mentor or self-studied with the use of books, but beyond that, it's up to you to learn the magic that monsters can offer. A monster mage's path to power is not always linear. For every monster mage interested in growing in raw power through dangerous adventures, another monster mage disappears into the wilderness and methodically defeats weak monsters until they return with the knowledge of countless spells.

The monster mage archetype synergizes well with the system of crafting with monster parts, since you have a lot of incentive to hunt down monsters anyway, getting what you want doesn't reduce the value of your monster parts, and keeping track of the spells monsters know is useful both for you and for someone want to add a spell imbued property.

Monster Tokens

As a monster mage, your collection of tokens is as personal and as vital as a wizard's spellbook or a witch's familiar, as you commune with the power of your tokens to prepare your spells. As such, your tokens can take as many different forms as there are customs and conventions among monster mages. If you're focused on the idea that the eyes are the pathways to the will, and to magic, you might preserve the eyes of various creatures inside amber to act as your tokens. Instead, if you were more interested in the way that creatures draw upon the ambient magic of the world around them through their outer bodies, you might create tokens out of scales, plates, feathers, bits of exoskeleton, tufts of hair, or skin.

Your customs when it comes to creating tokens are up to you. However, if multiple people in your group are playing monster mages, vestige hunters, or other characters who might be interested in exactly what pieces of a creature they are able to salvage, be sure to coordinate to make sure you won't block each other from creating tokens, vestiges, or other bits of gear from the same creature. For instance, if another player is playing a monster mage that uses a creature's eyes to make tokens, you probably shouldn't choose to use a creature's eyes as well, or something that includes the eyes like the entire intact head. In general, the more of the creature you are using, the more likely that it'll come into conflict, so keep that in mind when you make your decision. Ultimately, you can always have your character be flexible with their customs for creating tokens to work with your party's needs. The magic works just as well no matter what, and many monster mages, like Zara, mix and match tokens of various sorts.

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.ZnOMjuTmAus26JEs]{Monster Mage Dedication} Feat 2

Prerequisites You must defeat a monster with an innate cantrip and preserve a piece to create your first token

You have completed the process to become a monster mage by defeating a monster and creating a token, a small magical receptacle created from a piece of the monster allowing you to store the monster's magic. Choose one of the innate cantrips from the monster you defeated for the prerequisite; you create a token from that monster's body which contains that cantrip, using the same tradition as the monster did. Write down the kind of monster, the spell, the tradition, and a quick description of the token's appearance. You cast spells by preparing them from your tokens, which you collect from the monsters you defeat using the Create Token activity. Your tokens only work for you, and you can't share spells with other spellcasters, even other monster mages, or use the Learn a Spell activity to learn more monster mage spells. You gain the @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Cast a Spell]{Cast a Spell} activity. You can prepare up to two cantrips each day from the spells in your tokens (though you only start with one initially until you defeat another monster with a different innate cantrip). You're trained in spell attack rolls and spell DCs with the spells you can from your tokens regardless of their tradition, but you don't become trained in spell attack rolls and spell DCs for other spells you cast. Your key spellcasting ability for monster mage archetype spells is Wisdom, and when you cast them they are monster mage spells cast from spell slots, not innate spells. You gain the Additional Lore skill feat, and must choose a Lore skill associated with a monster. You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-actions.YUteSwXyhoAe63IN]{Create Token} activity.

Special You can't select another dedication feat until you have gained two other feats from the monster mage archetype.

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.UzPMJxEwjZc9A4qD]{Basic Monster Mage Spellcasting} Feat 4

Prerequisites Monster Mage Dedication

You gain a 1st-level spell slot, which you can use to prepare monster mage spells from your tokens. At 6th level, you gain a 2nd-level spell slot. At 8th level, you gain a 3rd-level spell slot. When you prepare a spell from a token, you can heighten the spell (or reduce its level if the creature's innate spell was heightened above the minimum level); you need not cast it at the same spell level as the creature did. You can prepare a spell from the same token multiple times if you want to cast the spell several times during the day.

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.zMDF1bft6hZyo245]{Taste of Their Own Medicine} Feat 6

Prerequisites Monster Mage Dedication

Due to the sympathetic magic connecting you and your tokens, your spells are particular effective against the creatures whose token you used to cast them. Whenever you cast a monster mage spell against the exact same kind of creature whose token you used to prepare that spell, your target takes a -2 status penalty to their AC and saves against the spell. At the GM's discretion, if the creature is very similar but not the same (for instance, a lamia and a lamia matriarch might be similar enough, but not two creatures whose only thing they share in common is that they are both demons) the target might take a -1 status penalty to their AC and saves against the spell.

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.S3V7RhtH4RZdAZ7y]{Monster Breadth} Feat 8

Prerequisites Basic Monster Mage Spellcasting

You can cast more monster mage spells each day. Increase the spell slots you gain from monster mage archetype feats by 1 for each spell level other than your two highest monster mage spell slots.

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.w0VaJ15hGhLsq4TJ]{Expert Monster Mage Spellcasting} Feat 12

Prerequisites Basic Monster Mage Spellcasting

You become an expert in spell attack rolls and spell DCs with the spells you can from your tokens regardless of their tradition, but you don't become an expert in spell attack rolls and spell DCs for other spells you cast. You gain a 4th-level spell slot to cast monster mage spells. At 14th level, you gain a 5th-level spell slot, and at 16th level, you gain a 6th-level spell slot.

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.I4lVxH2Uf5orzpJX]{Master Monster Mage Spellcasting} Feat 18

Prerequisites Expert Monster Mage Spellcasting

You become a master in spell attack rolls and spell DCs with the spells you can from your tokens regardless of their tradition, but you don't become a master in spell attack rolls and spell DCs for other spells you cast. You gain a 7th-level spell slot to cast monster mage spells. At 20th level, you gain an 8th-level spell slot.

Vestige Hunter.name: 遗蜕猎人 Vestige Hunter
Vestige Hunter.text:
各路冒险者都会在他们的任务与使命中击败并杀死怪物，但你已经意识到，其中大多数人都任由敌人的残骸白白浪费。你会保留倒下敌人的遗蜕——奖杯与纪念物——它们因你们在殊死战斗中共享的联系，以及英雄与怪物神话的文化基石，而被浸染上一丝秘法魔法。当你将这些遗蜕融入你的道具时，它们会赋予你特殊增益，让你能以你倒下敌人的凶猛来战斗。

与怪物法师原型类似，遗蜕猎人原型也很适合与“用怪物部件进行制作”的系统搭配：因为你本就会狩猎怪物，而保留一件遗蜕也不会限制你能收集的怪物部件。

遗蜕猎人还是变形者？

遗蜕猎人原型的主题，是从你杀死的敌人身上取走纪念物，并将其融入你的道具以制造强大效果；但如果你的角色从诸如西格尔德传奇这类神话中得到灵感——他通过沐浴于被杀死的巨龙法夫纳之血而获得力量——又会如何？你也可以选择让角色将遗蜕吸收进自己的身体，变得越来越不再像人类，并将新能力描绘为与生俱来的变形，而非由实体遗蜕施展攻击！

例如，当你获得“遗蜕的绞缠（Vestige's Constrict）”时，你不必把一条触手加到你的道具上；你可以获得将一只手臂变形成触手的能力，以便在抓住敌人后将其绞缠。或者，你不必把翅膀做进护甲或衣物里，而是直接变形出一对翅膀。你可以让这些变形效果始终存在，或让它们在你使用“遗蜕猎人奉献（Vestige Hunter Dedication）”授予的专长时临机发生。

遗蜕猎人奉献 专长 2

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.2mUZlM8gUdXxtptz]{遗蜕猎人奉献（嗅觉）} 或 @Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.I5sqOWJi7jds6A8t]{遗蜕猎人奉献（视野）}

你学会了如何从敌人身上保留遗蜕并将其融入你自己的道具，附加那些被你最重要战斗赋予意义的碎片。你加入的第一批遗蜕强化了你的感官。选择获得微光视野与黑暗视觉，或获得射程30尺的不精确嗅觉。

特殊 在你从遗蜕猎人原型获得另外两个专长之前，你不能选择另一个奉献专长。

遗蜕的感官 专长 4

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.gZXMoI4MPv3aSTug]{遗蜕的感官（嗅觉）} 或 @Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.2Y66izmUsyIl4jSJ]{遗蜕的感官（视野）}

先决条件 遗蜕猎人奉献；你必须按需要击败一只具有微光视野、黑暗视觉或嗅觉的怪物

你融入了一件来自具备额外感官的怪物的遗蜕，使你获得那些你尚未从第一批遗蜕中得到的感官。这通常表现为将怪物的眼睛或鼻口等部位安置在你的装备上。你获得黑暗视觉与微光视野，或射程30尺的不精确嗅觉——取你在“遗蜕猎人奉献”中未选择者。

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.PUoLvunw93MjbIZq]{遗蜕的鳍} 专长 4

先决条件 遗蜕猎人奉献；你必须击败一只拥有游泳速度且为水生或两栖的怪物

你吸纳了一件来自水生怪物的遗蜕，使你能够游泳或在水下呼吸。这通常表现为在护甲中打造的一套鳍与鳃。你获得等同于你陆地速度的游泳速度，且你可以在水下呼吸。

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.YFAxBlpfEyEt5MmO]{遗蜕的吐息} 专长 6

先决条件 遗蜕猎人奉献；你必须击败一只拥有吐息武器，且其在锥形或线形范围内造成酸蚀、钝击、寒冷、电击、火焰、负能量、穿刺、正能量、挥砍或音波伤害的怪物

频率 每小时一次

你将一件来自具有吐息武器的生物的遗蜕融入你的道具中，例如把巨龙的头颅装在盾牌上，并能让它对敌人喷吐。你造成[[/r (@details.level.value)d6[untyped]]]{每等级1d6伤害}，伤害类型取决于你在选择该专长时所选怪物的吐息武器。吐息影响 @Template[type:cone|distance:30|damaging:true] 或 @Template[type:line|distance:60|damaging:true]，并要求进行一次基于你的职业DC或法术DC（取较高者）的基础反射豁免。

特殊 当你获得该专长时，选择一只你曾击败且具有吐息武器的怪物，并从先决条件所列的伤害类型中，为该吐息武器选择一种伤害类型；此选择应基于你击败过的怪物与收集到的遗蜕。如果该怪物的吐息武器造成多种符合条件的伤害类型，则从中选择一种。吐息的形状（锥形或线形）取决于你所选的怪物。一旦你为吐息武器选定怪物，你不能改变该选择，除非你对该专长进行重训。

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.CXJeIR4nl6vEyYP6]{遗蜕的绞缠} 专长 8

先决条件 遗蜕猎人奉献；你必须击败一只拥有绞缠（Constrict）或强效绞缠（Greater Constrict）的怪物

需求 你有一个敌人处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{被擒抱}。

你将一件来自以绞杀敌人闻名的生物的遗蜕嫁接进你的道具中，通常是一条触手、卷须、盘绕之躯或其他可用于绞缠的特性。遗蜕会本能地碾压你所擒抱的敌人。该敌人受到等同于[[/r @details.level.value + @abilities.str.mod]]{你的等级 + 你的力量调整值}的伤害，并进行一次基础强韧豁免；使用你的职业DC或法术DC（取较高者）。

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.waD2X3WngoV8qKlj]{遗蜕的借机} 专长 8

先决条件 遗蜕猎人奉献；你必须击败一只拥有借机攻击（Attack of Opportunity）的怪物

需求 一个位于你触及内的生物使用一个操作动作或移动动作、进行一次远程攻击，或在其正在使用的移动动作期间离开一个方格。

你将一件来自懂得利用破绽的怪物的遗蜕嵌入你的武器中，通常是该怪物用于进行徒手攻击的一部分。在战斗中，这些怪物部件会轻微抽动；当敌人露出破绽时，它们便会攻击。对触发的生物进行一次近战打击。若你的攻击为大成功且触发原因为一个操作动作，你将扰乱该动作。此打击不计入你的多重攻击减值，且你的多重攻击减值也不适用于此打击。

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.BOMX87mDM8uq2nQW]{遗蜕的攀爬} 专长 10

先决条件 遗蜕猎人奉献；你必须击败一只拥有攀爬速度的怪物

你将一件来自攀爬怪物的遗蜕附着在你的道具上，使你能够攀爬。这可能是一套攀爬利爪、纺丝器、黏着垫或其他各种攀爬特性。你获得等同于你陆地速度的攀爬速度。

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.Azgxt004ViH8RJ2t]{遗蜕的凶顽} 专长 12

先决条件 遗蜕猎人奉献；你必须击败一只拥有凶顽（ferocity）的怪物

频率 每小时一次

触发 你将会被降至0生命值但不会立刻被杀死。

你融入了一件来自拥有凶猛韧性、能死死攀附生命的生物的遗蜕。它不足以在你击败它时保护它自己，但或许那股凶顽的生命力会在你需要之时拯救你。你避免陷入昏迷并保持在1生命值，同时你的受伤状态增加1。

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.Ri3o4ZrKNct4rJ9W]{遗蜕的擒抱} 专长 14

先决条件 遗蜕猎人奉献；击败一只拥有擒抱（Grab）或精通擒抱（Improved Grab）的怪物

需求 你的上一个动作是一次成功的打击，且你要么有一只手空着，要么你的打击使用了一把擒抱武器。

你将一件来自擒抓怪物的遗蜕装在你的武器上，或装在你进行徒手攻击的位置附近，通常是该怪物用来擒抱敌人的一部分。在你用攻击分散敌人注意力后，遗蜕会猛然甩出以协助你擒抱敌人。你命中的敌人变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{被擒抱}，如同你在一次运动检定中成功 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Grapple]{擒抱} 该敌人一般。

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.Bz3bu4MXeSklJ5z2]{遗蜕的双翼} 专长 16

先决条件 遗蜕猎人奉献；你必须击败一只拥有飞行速度的怪物

你接纳了一件来自飞行怪物的遗蜕，使你能够飞行。这几乎总是以背后一对翅膀的形式出现，但也可能来自某种无需翅膀也能飞行的生物，呈现得更为玄奥。你获得等同于你陆地速度的飞行速度。

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.NYxw5UxfYRbhqEsk]{遗蜕的践踏冲锋} 专长 18

先决条件 遗蜕猎人奉献；你必须击败一只拥有践踏（Trample）的怪物

你将一件来自践踏怪物的遗蜕添加到你的腿部或足部装备上，使你能将敌人踩踏在脚下。这通常会融入怪物自身腿足的部分；当你使用“遗蜕的践踏冲锋”时，你自己的双腿可能会短暂变得更为巨大，并更充分地体现该生物的本质。你疾行至多你的速度的两倍，并且可以穿过至少比你小一级体型的生物的空间，践踏你进入其空间的每个生物。在一次“遗蜕的践踏冲锋”的使用中，你对同一个生物只能尝试践踏一次。你以你的足部徒手攻击造成钝击伤害，但被践踏的生物可以尝试一次对抗你的职业DC或法术DC（取较优者）的基础反射豁免。

特殊 当你选择该专长时，你获得一种足部徒手攻击，造成[[/r {1d6}[bludgeoning]]]{1d6钝击伤害}，且属于斗殴武器组。若你已经拥有更好的足部徒手攻击，你可以改用那个。

Adventurers of all stripes defeat and kill monsters as part of their quests and missions, but you've realized that most of them let their foes' remains go to waste. You retain vestiges of your fallen foes, trophies and mementos imbued with a bit of occult magic by the connection you shared during your battle to the death, and the cultural touchstones of myths of heroes and monsters. As you incorporate these vestiges into your gear, they grant you special benefits you can use to fight with the ferocity of your fallen foes.

Like the monster mage archetype, the vestige hunter archetype works well with the system of crafting with monster parts, since you were already hunting down monsters, and retaining a vestige doesn't limit the monster parts you can collect.

Vestige Hunter or Shapeshifter?

While the vestige hunter archetype is themed around the idea of taking mementos from your slain foes and incorporating them into your gear to use them to create powerful effects, what if your character took a page from myths like the legend of Sigurd, who gained powers by bathing in the blood of the slain dragon Fafnir? You could instead choose to have your character absorb the vestiges into their own body and become less and less human, flavoring the new abilities as inherent shapeshifting rather than physical vestiges performing the attacks!

For example, instead of adding a tentacle to your gear when you gain Vestige's Constrict, you might gain the ability to shapeshift one of your arms into a tentacle in order to constrict your foe after grabbing it, or instead of building wings into your armor or clothing, you could shapeshift a set of wings. You could apply the shapeshifting effects all the time, or have them happen on the fly as you use the feats from Vestige Hunter Dedication.

Vestige Hunter Dedication Feat 2

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.2mUZlM8gUdXxtptz]{Vestige Hunter Dedication (Scent)} or @Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.I5sqOWJi7jds6A8t]{Vestige Hunter Dedication (Vision)}

You have learned how to retain vestiges from your foes and incorporate them into your own gear, attaching pieces imbued with meaning from your most important battles. The first vestiges you added have enhanced your senses. Choose to either gain low-light vision and darkvision, or to gain imprecise scent with a range of 30 feet.

Special You can't select another dedication feat until you have gained two other feats from the vestige hunter archetype.

Vestige's Senses Feat 4

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.gZXMoI4MPv3aSTug]{Vestige's Senses (Scent)} or @Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.2Y66izmUsyIl4jSJ]{Vestige's Senses (Vision)}

Prerequisites Vestige Hunter Dedication, you must defeat a monster with low-light vision, darkvision, or scent, as appropriate

You incorporated a vestige from a monster with additional senses, granting you those you had not yet gained from your first vestiges. This often takes the form of the monster's eyes or snouts placed somewhere in your equipment. You gain either darkvision and low-light vision or imprecise scent with a range of 30 feet, whichever you didn't choose for Vestige Hunter Dedication.

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.PUoLvunw93MjbIZq]{Vestige's Fins} Feat 4

Prerequisites Vestige Hunter Dedication, you must defeat a monster with a swim Speed that is either aquatic or amphibious

You subsumed a vestige from an aquatic monster, allowing you to swim or breathe underwater. This usually takes the form of a set of fins and gills built into armor. You gain a swim Speed equal to your land Speed and you can breathe underwater.

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.YFAxBlpfEyEt5MmO]{Vestige's Breath} Feat 6

Prerequisites Vestige Hunter Dedication, you must defeat a monster with a breath weapon that deals acid, bludgeoning, cold, electricity, fire, negative, piercing, positive, slashing, or sonic damage in a cone or line

Frequency once per hour

You incorporated a vestige into your gear from a creature with a breath weapon, such as a dragon's head on your shield, and you can make it breathe on your foes. You deal [[/r (@details.level.value)d6[untyped]]]{1d6 damage per level} of a type of damage depending on the breath weapon of the monster you chose when you took this feat. The breath weapon affects either @Template[type:cone|distance:30|damaging:true] or a @Template[type:line|distance:60|damaging:true], with a basic Reflex save based on your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher.

Special When you gain this feat, choose a monster with a breath weapon you've defeated and type of damage for the breath weapon from the list of damage types in the prerequisite, based on the monsters you've defeated and the vestiges you've collected. If the monster has a breath weapon that deals multiple qualifying damage types, choose one of them. The breath weapon's shape, cone or line, depends on the monster you chose. Once you choose a monster for the breath weapon, you can't change that choice without retraining this feat.

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.CXJeIR4nl6vEyYP6]{Vestige's Constrict} Feat 8

Prerequisites Vestige Hunter Dedication, you must defeat a monster with Constrict or Greater Constrict

Requirements You have a foe @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed}.

You grafted a vestige into your gear from a creature known for constricting its foes, often a tentacle, tendril, coil, or other constricting feature. The vestige instinctively crushes your grabbed foe. The foe takes damage equal to [[/r @details.level.value + @abilities.str.mod]]{your level + your Strength modifier}, with a basic Fortitude save, using your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher.

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.waD2X3WngoV8qKlj]{Vestige's Opportunity} Feat 8

Prerequisites Vestige Hunter Dedication, you must defeat a monster with Attack of Opportunity

Requirements A creature within your reach uses a manipulate action or a move action, makes a ranged attack, or leaves a square during a move action it's using.

You built a vestige into your weapons from a monster that knew how to take advantage of openings, typically a piece of the monster that it used to make unarmed attacks. The monster's parts twitch slightly during battles, and when a foe drops their guard, they attack. Make a melee Strike against the triggering creature. If your attack is a critical hit and the trigger was a manipulate action, you disrupt that action. This Strike doesn't count toward your multiple attack penalty, and your multiple attack penalty doesn't apply to this Strike.

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.BOMX87mDM8uq2nQW]{Vestige's Climb} Feat 10

Prerequisites Vestige Hunter Dedication, you must defeat a monster with a climb Speed

You attached a vestige from a climbing monster to your gear, allowing you to climb. This might be a set of climbing claws, spinnerets, sticky pads, or various other climbing features. You gain a climb Speed equal to your land Speed.

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.Azgxt004ViH8RJ2t]{Vestige's Ferocity} Feat 12

Prerequisites Vestige Hunter Dedication, you must defeat a monster with ferocity

Frequency once per hour

Trigger You would be reduced to 0 Hit Points but not immediately killed.

You incorporated a vestige from a creature with the ferocious tenacity to cling to life. It wasn't enough to protect the creature when you defeated it, but perhaps that ferocious life force will save you now in your time of need. You avoid being knocked out and remain at 1 Hit Point, and your wounded condition increases by 1.

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.Ri3o4ZrKNct4rJ9W]{Vestige's Grab} Feat 14

Prerequisites Vestige Hunter Dedication, defeat a monster with Grab or Improved Grab

Requirements Your last action was a successful Strike, and either you have a hand free or your Strike used a grapple weapon.

You attached a vestige from a grabbing monster either to your weapons or near where you make your unarmed attacks, typically a piece of the monster that it used to grab foes. The vestige lashes out to help you grab an enemy after you distract the foe with your attack. The foe you hit becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed}, as if you had succeeded at an Athletics check to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Grapple]{Grapple} the foe.

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.Bz3bu4MXeSklJ5z2]{Vestige's Wings} Feat 16

Prerequisites Vestige Hunter Dedication, you must defeat a monster with a fly Speed

You embraced a vestige from a flying monster allowing you to fly. This is almost always in the form of a set of wings on your back, but it could be something more esoteric from a creature that flies without wings. You gain a fly Speed equal to your land Speed.

@Compendium[battlezoo-bestiary-pf2e.pf2e-battlezoo-feats-and-actions.NYxw5UxfYRbhqEsk]{Vestige's Stampede} Feat 18

Prerequisites Vestige Hunter Dedication, you must defeat a monster with Trample

You added a vestige from a trampling monster to your leg or footwear, allowing you to trample your foes underfoot. This often incorporates parts from the monster's own legs and feet, and when you use Vestige's Stampede, your own legs might briefly grow larger and embody the creature's essence more fully. You Stride up to double your Speed and can move through the spaces of creatures at least one size smaller, trampling each creature whose space you enter. You can attempt to trample the same creature only once in a single use of Vestige's Stampede. You deal bludgeoning damage for your foot unarmed attack, but trampled creatures can attempt a basic Reflex save against your class DC or spell DC, whichever is better.

Special When you take this feat, you gain a foot unarmed attack that deals [[/r {1d6}[bludgeoning]]]{1d6 bludgeoning damage} and is in the brawling weapon group. If you already have a better foot unarmed attack, you can use that instead.

Acid.name: 酸液 Acid
Acid.text:
酸蚀

塑能

魔法

类型 武器

组件 该怪物必须具有酸蚀（特征）或一种造成酸蚀伤害的攻击或法术。

效果 你将腐蚀性酸液灌注进该武器。

路径 魔法；在你第一次灌注该武器时选择，使所授予的法术为奥术或原初之一

  • 2级 该武器可以将@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Acid Splash]{Acid Splash}作为戏法施放，并以该物品等级的一半（向上取整）进行升阶
  • 4级 该武器每天可以施放1次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Acidic Burst]{Acidic Burst}
  • 6级 该武器的acidic burst升阶至2级，且每天可以施放1次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Acid Arrow]{Acid Arrow}或acidic burst之一，但不能两者都施放
  • 8级 该武器的Acidic Burst升阶至3级，且每天可以各施放1次acid arrow与acidic burst
  • 10级 用该武器进行的打击造成额外1点酸蚀伤害
  • 12级 该武器的acid arrow升阶至4级，且该武器每天可以施放1次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Acid Storm]{Acid Storm}
  • 14级 额外的酸蚀伤害提高至1d4
  • 16级 该武器的acid arrow升阶至6级，且acid storm升阶至7级
  • 18级 额外的酸蚀伤害提高至1d6
  • 20级 该武器每天可以施放1次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Storm of Vengeance]{Storm of Vengeance}，但你只能选择酸雨效果。你可以连续两次选择酸雨效果

路径 威能

  • 4级 用该武器进行的打击造成额外1点酸蚀伤害
  • 6级 额外的酸蚀伤害提高至1d4
  • 8级 额外的酸蚀伤害提高至1d6。在大成功的命中时，目标的护甲（若有）受到3d6酸蚀伤害（在应用硬度之前）；若目标举起了盾牌，则改为盾牌承受此伤害
  • 12级 该灌注属性造成的酸蚀伤害无视抗力
  • 14级 在大成功的命中时，对护甲或盾牌造成的酸蚀伤害提高至6d6
  • 18级 额外的酸蚀伤害提高至1d8
  • 20级 当你以该武器成功进行一次打击时，在应用酸蚀伤害之前，目标获得酸蚀弱点1，持续至你下个回合开始

路径 技法

  • 4级 用该武器进行的打击造成1点持续酸蚀伤害
  • 6级 用该武器进行的打击造成额外1点酸蚀伤害
  • 8级 持续酸蚀伤害提高至1d6。在大成功的命中时，目标的护甲（若有）受到3d6酸蚀伤害（在应用硬度之前）；若目标举起了盾牌，则改为盾牌承受此伤害
  • 12级 该灌注属性造成的酸蚀伤害（包括持续酸蚀伤害）无视抗力
  • 14级 命中时的持续酸蚀伤害提高至1d8
  • 16级 该灌注属性造成的持续酸蚀伤害会侵蚀敌人的抗力。每当敌人或敌人的护甲或盾牌在其回合结束时因持续酸蚀伤害而受到伤害时，任何抗力与硬度都降低1，持续1分钟。此效果可叠加
  • 18级 命中时的持续酸蚀伤害提高至1d10
  • 20级 在大成功的命中时，酸液侵蚀敌人的内脏，其陷入@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Drained]{Drained 1}

Acid

Evocation

Magical

Type Weapon

Parts The monster must have the acid trait or an attack or spell that deals acid damage.

Effect You imbue the weapon with vitriolic acid.

Path Magic; Choose when you first imbue the weapon for the granted spells to be either arcane or primal

  • 2nd The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Acid Splash]{Acid Splash} as a cantrip, heightened to half the item's level rounded up
  • 4th The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Acidic Burst]{Acidic Burst} once per day
  • 6th The weapon's acidic burst heightens to 2nd level and it can cast either @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Acid Arrow]{Acid Arrow} or acidic burst once per day, but not both
  • 8th The weapon's Acidic Burst heightens to 3rd level, and it can cast acid arrow and acidic burst each once per day
  • 10th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional acid damage
  • 12th The weapon's acid arrow heightens to 4th level, and the weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Acid Storm]{Acid Storm} once per day
  • 14th The additional acid damage increases to 1d4
  • 16th The weapon's acid arrow heightens to 6th level and acid storm heightens to 7th level
  • 18th The additional acid damage increases to 1d6
  • 20th The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Storm of Vengeance]{Storm of Vengeance} once per day but you can only choose the acid rain effect. You can choose the acid rain effect twice in a row

Path Might

  • 4th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional acid damage
  • 6th The additional acid damage increases to 1d4
  • 8th The additional acid damage increases to 1d6. On a critical hit, the target's armor (if any) takes 3d6 acid damage (before applying Hardness); if the target has a shield raised, the shield takes this damage instead
  • 12th The acid damage dealt by this imbued property ignores resistances
  • 14th The acid damage dealt to armor or shield on a critical hit increases to 6d6
  • 18th The additional acid damage increases to 1d8
  • 20th On a successful Strike with the weapon, before applying acid damage, the target gains weakness 1 to acid until the beginning of your next turn

Path Technique

  • 4th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 persistent acid damage
  • 6th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional acid damage
  • 8th The persistent acid damage increases to 1d6. On a critical hit, the target's armor (if any) takes3d6 acid damage (before applying Hardness); if the target has a shield raised, the shield takes this damage instead
  • 12th The acid damage dealt by this imbued property (including the persistent acid damage) ignores resistances
  • 14th The persistent acid damage on a hit increases to 1d8
  • 16th The persistent acid damage from the imbued property eats away at a foe's resistances. Every time a foe or the foe's armor or shield takes damage from the persistent acid damage at the end of their turn, any resistances and Hardness decrease by 1 for 1 minute. This effect is cumulative
  • 18th The persistent acid damage on a hit increases to 1d10
  • 20th On a critical hit, acid eats away at the foe's innards, and they are @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Drained]{Drained 1}

Bane.name: 灾祸 Bane
Bane.text:
塑能

魔法

类型 武器

材料 怪物必须与你为祸害所选择的类型相同，或由GM酌情决定，为你为祸害所选择类型的对立类型，例如使用天界生物的部件来制作一把针对邪魔的祸害武器。

效果 你将武器灌注以能量：这些能量源于你先前击败其部件寄宿其中的生物，或源于某种生物类型的对立能量，使武器对特定类型的生物尤为有效。你在制作祸害武器时，从以下选项中选择一种：异怪、动物、星界、野兽、天界生物、构装体、龙类、梦境、元素、生灵界、妖精、邪魔、巨人、监察者、负能量、软泥、正能量、灵体、时代，或同时选择真菌与植物。自此之后，本条目将你选择的生物类型称为武器的“祸害类型”。

路径 力量

  • 2级 用该武器进行的打击对祸害类型生物造成额外1点伤害（类型为该武器的基础伤害类型）
  • 4级 对祸害类型的额外伤害提高至1d4
  • 6级 对祸害类型的额外伤害提高至1d6。在大成功或大失败的命中时，你汲取祸害类型生物的力量，使其获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 1} 直到你下个回合结束
  • 10级 对抗祸害类型生物时，武器的基础伤害无视目标前5点抗力
  • 14级 该武器能够直接杀死其祸害类型的生物。在大成功或大失败的命中时，祸害类型生物不再是直到你下个回合结束的力竭（状态）1，而必须尝试一次强韧豁免。在大成功或大失败的成功时，它在你下个回合结束前为力竭（状态）1；在成功时，它为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 2} 直到你下个回合结束；在失败时，它为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 3} 直到你下个回合结束；在大成功或大失败的失败时，它被摧毁。此效果具有失能（特征）
  • 16级 对祸害类型生物的额外伤害提高至1d8
  • 20级 对祸害类型生物的额外伤害提高至1d10

路径 技巧

  • 2级 用该武器进行的打击会在武器的祸害类型生物体内或体外造成出血。对抗此类生物时，该武器的打击造成1点持续流血伤害
  • 4级 用该武器进行的打击对武器的祸害类型生物造成额外1点伤害（类型为该武器的基础伤害类型）
  • 6级 持续流血伤害提高至1d6。在大成功或大失败的命中时，你汲取祸害类型生物的力量，使其直到你下个回合结束为力竭（状态）1
  • 10级 对抗祸害类型生物时，武器的基础伤害无视目标前5点抗力，且该属性带来的持续流血伤害无视目标的抗力
  • 12级 命中祸害类型生物时的持续流血伤害提高至1d8
  • 14级 该武器能够直接杀死其祸害类型的生物。在大成功或大失败的命中时，祸害类型生物直到你下个回合结束为力竭（状态）2。它还必须尝试一次强韧豁免。在失败时，它改为直到你下个回合结束为力竭（状态）3（而非力竭（状态）2）；在大成功或大失败的失败时，它被摧毁。此效果具有失能（特征）
  • 16级 命中祸害类型生物时的持续流血伤害提高至1d10
  • 20级 失血持续从武器的祸害类型生物身上汲取力量。大成功或大失败命中所造成的力竭（状态）持续时间与持续流血伤害相同，或直到你下个回合结束，以较长者为准

Evocation

Magical

Type Weapon

Parts The monster must be of the same type as the type you chose for bane, or at the GM's discretion, of a type anathematic to the type you chose for bane, such as using celestial parts to make a weapon bane against fiends.

Effect You imbue the weapon with energies spawned by your previous defeat of the creatures whose parts reside within it, or from energies anathematic to a certain type of creature, in order to make the weapon particularly effective against a specific type of creature. When you create a bane weapon, choose aberration, animal, astral, beast, celestial, construct, dragon, dream, elemental, ethereal, fey, fiend, giant, monitor, negative, ooze, positive, spirit, time, or both fungus and plant. Hereafter, this entry refers to the type of creature you chose as the weapon's "bane type".

Path Might

  • 2nd Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional damage of the weapon's base damage type to creatures of the bane type
  • 4th The additional damage against the bane type increases to 1d4
  • 6th The additional damage against the bane type increases to 1d6. On a critical hit, you sap the strength of a creature from the bane type, causing it to be @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 1} until the end of your next turn
  • 10th Against a creature of the bane type, the weapon's base damage ignores the first 5 points of the target's resistance
  • 14th The weapon can outright slay creatures of its bane type. On a critical hit, instead of being enfeebled 1 until the end of your next turn, a creature of the weapon's bane type must attempt a Fortitude save. On a critical success, it's enfeebled 1 until the end of your next turn, on a success, it's @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 2} until the end of your next turn, on a failure, it's @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 3} until the end of your next turn, and on a critical failure, it's destroyed. This effect has the incapacitation trait
  • 16th The additional damage against creatures of the bane type increases to 1d8
  • 20th The additional damage against creatures of the bane type increases to 1d10

Path Technique

  • 2nd Strikes with the weapon cause external or internal bleeding in creatures of the weapon's bane type. Against such creatures, Strikes with the weapon deal 1 persistent bleed damage
  • 4th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional damage of the weapon's base damage type to creatures of the weapon's bane type
  • 6th The persistent bleed damage increases to 1d6. On a critical hit, you sap the strength of a creature of the bane type, causing it to be enfeebled 1 until the end of your next turn
  • 10th Against a creature of the bane type, the weapon's base damage ignores the first 5 points of the target's resistance and the persistent bleed damage from this property ignores the target's resistance
  • 12th The persistent bleed damage on a hit against a creature of the bane type increases to 1d8
  • 14th The weapon can outright slay creatures of its bane type. On a critical hit, a creature of the bane type is enfeebled 2 until the end of your next turn. It must also attempt a Fortitude save. On a failure, it's enfeebled 3 until the end of your next turn instead of enfeebled 2, and on a critical failure, it's destroyed. This effect has the incapacitation trait
  • 16th The persistent bleed damage on a hit against a creature of the bane type increases to 1d10
  • 20th The blood loss continues to sap strength from creatures of the weapon's bane type. The enfeebled condition from a critical hit lasts as long as the persistent bleed damage lasts, or until the end of your next turn, whichever is longer

Chaotic.name: 混乱 Chaotic
Chaotic.text:
混沌

塑能

魔法

类型 武器

部件 该怪物必须具有混沌特征，或拥有造成混沌伤害的攻击或法术。

效果 你将无政府式的混沌灌注进武器，以击败守序的敌人。

路径 魔法；此灌注属性所赋予的法术始终为神术

  • 2级 该武器可以将@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Divine Lance]{Divine Lance}作为戏法施放，只造成混沌伤害，并提高至物品等级的一半（向上取整）
  • 4级 该武器每天可以施放1次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Protection]{Protection}，且仅防护守序
  • 8级 该武器每天可以施放1次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Searing Light]{Searing Light}，但其基础伤害为强酸而非火焰；它对守序的天界生物、监察者与邪魔造成额外混沌伤害，而非对邪魔与不死生物造成额外善良伤害；并且它具有强酸与混沌特征，而非火焰与善良
  • 10级 该武器每天可以施放1次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Divine Wrath]{Divine Wrath}（仅混沌）
  • 12级 以该武器进行的打击造成额外1点混沌伤害
  • 14级 当造成额外混沌伤害时，掷一次@Check[type:flat|dc:11] data-pf2-show-dc="all">纯骰检定。若成功，该伤害从1提高至4
  • 16级 该武器可以施放@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Divine Decree]{Divine Decree}（仅混沌）。武器的divine wrath提高至5环
  • 18级 当造成额外混沌伤害时，若在@Check[type:flat|dc:11] data-pf2-show-dc="all">纯骰检定中成功，该伤害提高至6而非4
  • 20级 该武器可以施放@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Divine Aura]{Divine Aura}（仅混沌），武器的divine decree提高至8环，且武器的divine wrath提高至7环

路径 威能

  • 6级 以该武器进行的打击造成额外1点混沌伤害
  • 8级 当造成额外混沌伤害时，掷一次@Check[type:flat|dc:11] data-pf2-show-dc="all">纯骰检定。若成功，该伤害从1提高至4
  • 10级 当造成额外混沌伤害时，若在@Check[type:flat|dc:11] data-pf2-show-dc="all">纯骰检定中成功，该伤害提高至6而非4
  • 12级 当你对一名守序生物造成重击时，你令其昏乱。它获得@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1}直到你下个回合结束
  • 14级 此灌注属性所造成的混沌伤害无视抗力
  • 18级 当造成额外混沌伤害时，若在@Check[type:flat|dc:11] data-pf2-show-dc="all">纯骰检定中成功，该伤害提高至8而非6
  • 20级 当你用该武器成功进行一次打击时，在应用混沌伤害之前，一名守序目标获得对混沌的弱点1，持续至你下个回合开始

路径 技巧

  • 6级 以该武器进行的打击造成额外1点混沌伤害
  • 8级 以该武器进行的打击造成额外1点持续性混沌伤害
  • 10级 当造成持续性混沌伤害时，掷一次@Check[type:flat|dc:11] data-pf2-show-dc="all">纯骰检定。若成功，该伤害从1提高至6
  • 12级 当你对一名守序生物造成重击时，你令其昏乱。它获得迟钝1直到你下个回合结束
  • 14级 此灌注属性所造成的混沌伤害（包括持续性混沌伤害）无视抗力
  • 16级 当你对一名守序生物造成重击时，它获得@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 2}而非迟钝1
  • 18级 当造成持续性混沌伤害时，若在@Check[type:flat|dc:11] data-pf2-show-dc="all">纯骰检定中成功，该伤害提高至10而非6
  • 20级 当你造成重击时，昏乱效果变得更为强大。在目标变为迟钝2之后，它必须在一次意志豁免中成功，否则将变为@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Confused]{Confused}，持续1轮

Chaotic

Evocation

Magical

Type Weapon

Parts The monster must have the chaotic trait or an attack or spell that deals chaotic damage.

Effect You imbue the weapon with anarchic chaos to defeat orderly foes.

Path Magic; The spells granted by this imbued property are always divine

  • 2nd The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Divine Lance]{Divine Lance} as a cantrip, dealing chaotic damage only, heightened to half the item's level rounded up
  • 4th The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Protection]{Protection} once per day, protecting against lawful only
  • 8th The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Searing Light]{Searing Light} once per day, except the base damage is acid instead of fire, it deals additional chaotic damage to lawful celestials, monitors, and fiends instead of dealing additional good damage to fiends and undead, and it has the acid and chaotic traits instead of fire and good
  • 10th The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Divine Wrath]{Divine Wrath} (chaotic only) once per day
  • 12th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional chaotic damage
  • 14th Roll a @Check[type:flat|dc:11] data-pf2-show-dc="all">Flat Check when dealing additional chaotic damage. On a success, the damage increases from 1 to 4
  • 16th The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Divine Decree]{Divine Decree} (chaotic only). The weapon's divine wrath heightens to 5th level
  • 18th On a successful @Check[type:flat|dc:11] data-pf2-show-dc="all">Flat Check when dealing additional chaotic damage, the damage increases to 6 instead of 4
  • 20th The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Divine Aura]{Divine Aura} (chaotic only), the weapon's divine decree heightens to 8th level, and the weapon's divine wrath heightens to 7th level

Path Might

  • 6th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional chaotic damage
  • 8th Roll a @Check[type:flat|dc:11] data-pf2-show-dc="all">Flat Check when dealing additional chaotic damage. On a success, the damage increases from 1 to 4
  • 10th On a successful @Check[type:flat|dc:11] data-pf2-show-dc="all">Flat Check when dealing additional chaotic damage, the damage increases to 6 instead of 4
  • 12th On a critical hit against a lawful creature, you befuddle it. It becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1} until the end of your next turn
  • 14th The chaotic damage dealt by this imbued property ignores resistances
  • 18th On a successful @Check[type:flat|dc:11] data-pf2-show-dc="all">Flat Check when dealing additional chaotic damage, the damage increases to 8 instead of 6
  • 20th On a successful Strike with the weapon, before applying chaotic damage, a lawful target gains weakness 1 to chaotic until the beginning of your next turn

Path Technique

  • 6th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional chaotic damage
  • 8th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 persistent chaotic damage
  • 10th Roll a @Check[type:flat|dc:11] data-pf2-show-dc="all">Flat Check when dealing persistent chaotic damage. On a success, the damage increases from 1 to 6
  • 12th On a critical hit against a lawful creature, you befuddle it. It becomes stupefied 1 until the end of your next turn
  • 14th The chaotic damage dealt by this imbued property (including persistent chaotic damage) ignores resistances
  • 16th On a critical hit against a lawful creature, they become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 2} instead of stupefied 1
  • 18th On a successful @Check[type:flat|dc:11] data-pf2-show-dc="all">Flat Check when dealing persistent chaotic damage, the damage increases to 10 instead of 6
  • 20th On a critical hit, the befuddling effect becomes even more powerful. After becoming stupefied 2, the target must succeed at a Will save or become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Confused]{Confused} for 1 round

Charisma.name: 魅力 Charisma
Charisma.text:
附魔

魔法

类型 技能物品（基于魅力的技能）

部件 该生物必须将魅力作为其最高或第二高的能力调整值。

效果 你为该物品灌注令人目眩的魅力。

  • 8级 该物品每天一次可以作为一环秘法法术施放@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Heroism]{Heroism}，因为你内在的魅力会激励你或一名盟友走向伟大
  • 14级 该物品的heroism法术升阶至6级
  • 17级 当你注入该物品时，你要么将你的魅力属性值提高2点，要么将其提高至18，以能使你获得更高属性值者为准。该物品获得巅峰特征
  • 20级 该物品的heroism法术升阶至9级

Enchantment

Magical

Type Skill Item (Charisma-based skill)

Parts The creature must have Charisma as its highest or second- highest ability modifier.

Effect You imbue the item with dazzling charisma.

  • 8th The item can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Heroism]{Heroism} once per day as an occult spell, as your inner Charisma inspires you or an ally to greatness
  • 14th The item's heroism spell heightens to 6th level
  • 17th When you invest the item, you either increase your Charisma score by 2 or increase it to 18, whichever would give you a higher score. The item gains the apex trait
  • 20th The item's heroism spell heightens to 9th level

Cold.name: 寒冷 Cold
Cold.text:
寒冷

塑能

魔法

类型 武器

部件 该怪物必须具有寒冷（特征），或拥有造成寒冷伤害的攻击或法术。

效果 你将刺骨的寒冷灌注进这把武器。

路径 魔法；在你第一次灌注武器时选择，使所获得的法术为奥术或原始之一

  • 2级 该武器可以将@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Ray of Frost]{Ray of Frost}作为戏法施放，并将其升阶至该物品等级的一半（向上取整）
  • 4级 该武器每天可以施放一次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Chilling Spray]{Chilling Spray}
  • 6级 该武器的chilling spray升阶至2环
  • 8级 用该武器进行的打击造成额外1点寒冷伤害
  • 10级 该武器每天可以施放一次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.kHyjQbibRGPNCixx]{Ice Storm}
  • 12级 该武器的chilling spray升阶至3环，并且该武器每天可以施放一次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Cone of Cold]{Cone of Cold}
  • 14级 额外寒冷伤害提升至1d4
  • 16级 该武器的chilling spray、cone of cold与ice storm升阶至6环
  • 18级 额外寒冷伤害提升至1d6
  • 20级 该武器每天可以施放一次9环@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Polar Ray]{Polar Ray}。

路径 威能

  • 4级 用该武器进行的打击造成额外1点寒冷伤害
  • 6级 额外寒冷伤害提升至1d4
  • 8级 额外寒冷伤害提升至1d6。在大成功或大失败命中时，除非目标在对抗该武器DC的强韧豁免中成功，否则目标还会获得@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Slowed]{Slowed 1}直到你下个回合结束
  • 12级 此灌注属性造成的寒冷伤害无视抗力
  • 14级 以该武器造成大成功或大失败命中时，目标还会在1轮内对其速度承受-10尺状态减值
  • 18级 额外寒冷伤害提升至1d8
  • 20级 以该武器成功打击时，在结算寒冷伤害之前，目标获得寒冷弱点1，直到你下个回合开始。

路径 技法

  • 4级 用该武器进行的打击造成1点持续寒冷伤害
  • 6级 以该武器成功打击时，目标在1轮内对其速度承受-5-尺状态减值
  • 8级 在大成功或大失败命中时，除非目标在对抗该武器DC的强韧豁免中成功，否则目标还会获得slowed 1直到你下个回合结束。对目标速度的状态减值提升至-10
  • 12级 此灌注属性造成的持续寒冷伤害无视抗力
  • 14级 其速度被该灌注属性降低的生物解冻得更慢。该减值持续时间与持续寒冷伤害的持续时间相同
  • 16级 靠近某个表面的敌人若在对抗缓慢效果的豁免中大成功或大失败，则会冻结在该表面（通常是地面）上，成为@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Immobilized]{Immobilized}直到其以对抗该物品DC的方式逃脱
  • 18级 命中时的持续寒冷伤害提升至1d4
  • 20级 对目标速度的状态减值提升至-15

Cold

Evocation

Magical

Type Weapon

Parts The monster must have the cold trait or an attack or spell that deals cold damage.

Effect You imbue the weapon with chilling cold.

Path Magic; Choose when you first imbue the weapon for the granted spells to be either arcane or primal

  • 2nd The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Ray of Frost]{Ray of Frost} as a cantrip, heightened to half the item's level rounded up
  • 4th The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Chilling Spray]{Chilling Spray} once per day
  • 6th The weapon's chilling spray heightens to 2nd level
  • 8th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional cold damage
  • 10th The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.kHyjQbibRGPNCixx]{Ice Storm} once per day
  • 12th The weapon's chilling spray heightens to 3rd level, and the weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Cone of Cold]{Cone of Cold} once per day
  • 14th The additional cold damage increases to 1d4
  • 16th The weapon's chilling spray, cone of cold, and ice storm heighten to 6th level
  • 18th The additional cold damage increases to 1d6
  • 20th The weapon can cast 9th-level @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Polar Ray]{Polar Ray} once per day.

Path Might

  • 4th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional cold damage
  • 6th The additional cold damage increases to 1d4
  • 8th The additional cold damage increases to 1d6. On a critical hit, the target is also @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Slowed]{Slowed 1} until the end of your next turn unless it succeeds at a Fortitude save against the weapon's DC
  • 12th The cold damage dealt by this imbued property ignores resistances
  • 14th On a critical hit with the weapon, the target also takes a -10-foot status penalty to its Speeds for 1 round
  • 18th The additional cold damage increases to 1d8
  • 20th On a successful Strike with the weapon, before applying cold damage, the target gains weakness 1 to cold until the beginning of your next turn.

Path Technique

  • 4th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 persistent cold damage
  • 6th On a successful Strike with the weapon, the target takes a -5- foot status penalty to its Speeds for 1 round
  • 8th On a critical hit, the target is also slowed 1 until the end of your next turn unless it succeeds at a Fortitude save against the weapon's DC. The status penalty to a target's Speeds increases to -10
  • 12th The persistent cold damage dealt by this imbued property ignores resistances
  • 14th A creature with their Speeds decreased by the imbued property thaws more slowly. The penalty lasts as long as the persistent cold damage does
  • 16th Foes adjacent to a surface who critically fail the save against the slow effect freeze to that surface (usually the ground), becoming @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Immobilized]{Immobilized} until they Escape against the item's DC
  • 18th The persistent cold damage on a hit increases to 1d4
  • 20th The status penalty to a target's Speeds increases to -15

Constitution.name: 体质 Constitution
Constitution.text:
魔法

死灵

类型 技能物品

部件 该生物的体质必须是其最高或第二高的能力调整值。

效果 你以坚韧的体质为物品注入力量。

  • 第8等级 该物品每天一次可以仅以你为目标施放3环@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Heal]{Heal}，作为神术法术
  • 第14等级 该物品的heal法术升阶至6环
  • 第17等级 当你灌注该物品时，你要么使你的体质属性值增加2，要么将其提高到18，以能使你获得更高属性值者为准。该物品获得巅峰特征
  • 第18等级 该物品的heal法术升阶至7环，并且每天你可以选择改为让该物品每天一次仅以你为目标施放@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Regenerate]{Regenerate}，而非heal
  • 第20等级 若你休息10分钟，你恢复100点生命值

Magical

Necromancy

Type Skill Item

Parts The creature must have Constitution as its highest or second- highest ability modifier.

Effect You imbue the item with resilient constitution.

  • 8th The item can cast 3rd-level @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Heal]{Heal}, on you only, once per day as a divine spell
  • 14th The item's heal spell heightens to 6th level
  • 17th When you invest the item, you either increase your Constitution score by 2 or increase it to 18, whichever would give you a higher score. The item gains the apex trait
  • 18th The item's heal spell heightens to 7th level and each day you can choose to instead have the item cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Regenerate]{Regenerate} on you once per day, instead of heal
  • 20th If you rest for 10 minutes, you recover 100 Hit Points

Dexterity.name: 敏捷 Dexterity
Dexterity.text:
魔法

变化

类型 技能物品（基于敏捷的技能）

组成部分 该生物必须将敏捷作为其最高或第二高的能力调整值。

效果 你为该物品灌注灵巧的敏捷。

  • 8级 每日一次，你可以使用单动作交互启动以在10分钟内获得对你所有速度的+10英尺状态加值
  • 14级 该启动带来的对你速度的物品加值提高至+20英尺，且在启动期间，你获得@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Water Walk]{Water Walk}的效果
  • 17级 当你注能该物品时，你要么使你的敏捷属性值提高2点，要么将其提高至18，取能使你获得更高属性值者。该物品获得巅峰特征
  • 20级 该启动带来的对你速度的物品加值提高至+30英尺，且在启动期间，你同时获得@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.b5sGjGlBf58f8jn0]{Air Walk}与water walk的效果

Magical

Transmutation

Type Skill Item (Dexterity-based skill)

Parts The creature must have Dexterity as its highest or second- highest ability modifier.

Effect You imbue the item with deft dexterity.

  • 8th Once per day, you can use a single action Interact activation to gain a +10-foot status bonus to all your Speeds for 10 minutes
  • 14th The item bonus to your Speeds from the activation increases to +20 feet and while activated, you gain the effects of @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Water Walk]{Water Walk}
  • 17th When you invest the item, you either increase your Dexterity score by 2 or increase it to 18, whichever would give you a higher score. The item gains the apex trait
  • 20th The item bonus to your Speeds from the activation increases to +30 feet, and while activated, you gain the effects of both @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.b5sGjGlBf58f8jn0]{Air Walk} and water walk

Electricity.name: 电击 Electricity
Electricity.text:
电击

塑能

魔法

类型 武器

部件 该怪物必须拥有电击（特征）或一种造成电击伤害的攻击或法术。

效果 你为武器灌注令人震颤的电流。

路径 魔法；在你首次为武器灌注时选择，使所授予的法术为奥术或原初

  • 2级 该武器可以将@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Electric Arc]{Electric Arc}作为戏法施放，其升阶至该物品等级的一半（向上取整）
  • 4级 该武器每天可以施放一次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Shocking Grasp]{Shocking Grasp}
  • 6级 该武器的shocking grasp升阶至2环
  • 8级 该武器每天可以施放一次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Lightning Bolt]{Lightning Bolt}
  • 10级 用该武器进行的打击造成额外1点电击伤害
  • 12级 该武器的lightning bolt升阶至4环，且该武器每天可以施放一次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Lightning Storm]{Lightning Storm} 
  • 14级 额外电击伤害增加至1d4
  • 16级 该武器可以施放@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Chain Lightning]{Chain Lightning}但不再能施放lightning bolt。该武器的shocking grasp与lightning storm升阶至6环
  • 18级 额外电击伤害增加至1d6
  • 20级 该武器的chain lightning升阶至9环，且lightning storm与shocking grasp升阶至7环

路径 强力

  • 4级 用该武器进行的打击造成额外1点电击伤害
  • 6级 额外电击伤害增加至1d4
  • 8级 额外电击伤害增加至1d6。大成功时，电弧迸发，对你在目标10尺内所选择的至多两个其他生物造成等量的电击伤害
  • 12级 此灌注属性造成的电击伤害无视抗力
  • 14级 大成功时受到电击伤害的两个额外生物可以距离目标至多20尺
  • 18级 额外电击伤害增加至1d8
  • 20级 用该武器成功进行一次打击时，在结算电击伤害之前，目标获得电击弱点1，持续至你下个回合开始

路径 技法

  • 4级 用该武器进行的打击造成1点持续电击伤害
  • 6级 用该武器进行的打击造成额外1点电击伤害
  • 8级 持续电击伤害增加至1d6。大成功时，电弧迸发，对你在目标10尺内所选择的至多两个其他生物造成等量的电击伤害与持续电击伤害
  • 12级 此灌注属性造成的电击伤害（包含持续电击伤害）无视抗力
  • 14级 命中时的持续电击伤害增加至1d8
  • 16级 大成功时，电弧迸发至你在目标20尺内所选择的至多四个其他生物
  • 18级 命中时的持续电击伤害增加至1d10
  • 20级 因此灌注属性而承受持续电击伤害的生物会被磁化，吸引金属武器。只要其仍承受该持续电击伤害，用金属武器对其进行的打击获得+1环境加值以命中它们

Electricity

Evocation

Magical

Type Weapon

Parts The monster must have the electricity trait or an attack or spell that deals electricity damage.

Effect You imbue the weapon with shocking electricity.

Path Magic; Choose when you first imbue the weapon for the granted spells to be either arcane or primal

  • 2nd The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Electric Arc]{Electric Arc} as a cantrip, heightened to half the item's level rounded up
  • 4th The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Shocking Grasp]{Shocking Grasp} once per day
  • 6th The weapon's shocking grasp heightens to 2nd level
  • 8th The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Lightning Bolt]{Lightning Bolt} once per day
  • 10th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional electricity damage
  • 12th The weapon's lightning bolt heightens to 4th level, and the weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Lightning Storm]{Lightning Storm} once per day
  • 14th The additional electricity damage increases to 1d4
  • 16th The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Chain Lightning]{Chain Lightning} but can no longer cast lightning bolt. The weapon's shocking grasp and lightning storm heighten to 6th level
  • 18th The additional electricity damage increases to 1d6
  • 20th The weapon's chain lightning heightens to 9th level, and lightning storm and shocking grasp heighten to 7th level

Path Might

  • 4th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional electricity damage
  • 6th The additional electricity damage increases to 1d4
  • 8th The additional electricity damage increases to 1d6. On a critical hit, electricity arcs out to deal an equal amount of electricity damage to up to two other creatures of your choice within 10 feet of the target
  • 12th The electricity damage dealt by this imbued property ignores resistances
  • 14th The two additional creatures that take electricity damage on a critical hit can be up to 20 feet away from the target
  • 18th The additional electricity damage increases to 1d8
  • 20th On a successful Strike with the weapon, before applying electricity damage, the target gains weakness 1 to electricity until the beginning of your next turn

Path Technique

  • 4th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 persistent electricity damage
  • 6th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional electricity damage
  • 8th The persistent electricity damage increases to 1d6. On a critical hit, electricity arcs out to deal an equal amount of electricity damage and persistent electricity damage to up to two other creatures of your choice within 10 feet of the target
  • 12th The electricity damage dealt by this imbued property (including persistent electricity damage) ignores resistances
  • 14th The persistent electricity damage on a hit increases to 1d8
  • 16th On a critical hit, the electricity arcs out to up to four other creatures of your choice within 20 feet of the target
  • 18th The persistent electricity damage on a hit increases to 1d10
  • 20th Creatures suffering persistent electricity damage from this imbued property become magnetized, attracting metal weapons. Strikes with metal weapons gain a +1 circumstance bonus to hit them as long as they have the persistent electricity damage

Energy Resistant.name: 能量抗性 Energy Resistant
Energy Resistant.text:
防护系

魔法

类型 护甲或盾牌

组件 该怪物必须对你选择的能量（伤害类型）具有抗力或免疫。

效果 你灌注护甲或盾牌，使其保护你免受某种特定的能量（伤害类型）。选择酸、寒冷、电击、火焰、力场、负能量、正能量或音波伤害。当你穿戴该护甲或持用该盾牌时，你获得等同于此灌注属性之灌注等级的、对所选能量（伤害类型）伤害的抗力。此外，该护甲或盾牌本身也获得相同的抗力。若被灌注的物品是盾牌，则除其通常的触发之外，只要你将要承受所选伤害类型，你都可以使用盾牌格挡（Shield Block）。例如，假设你有一面12等级的盾牌，具有11硬度，并给予你12火焰抗力。若你因@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Fireball]{Fireball}而受到40点伤害，你会因火焰抗力将伤害降至28点。若你随后使用盾牌格挡（Shield Bock），你将承受17点火焰伤害，而你的盾牌由于自身也有12点火焰抗力，只会承受5点火焰伤害。你可以对一套护甲多次灌注此属性，但每次你都必须选择不同的能量（伤害类型）伤害类型，且每一个都分别计入护甲的灌注上限。

Abjuration

Magical

Type Armor or Shield

Parts The monster must have resistance or immunity to the energy type you choose.

Effect You imbue the armor or shield to protect yourself from a particular type of energy. Choose acid, cold, electricity, fire, force, negative, positive, or sonic damage. While wearing the armor, or wielding the shield, you gain resistance to the chosen energy damage type equal to this imbued property's imbuing level. Additionally, the armor or shield itself gains the same resistance. If the imbued item is a shield, you can use Shield Block any time you would take the chosen damage type, in addition to its usual trigger. For example, suppose you had a 12th level shield with 11 Hardness, granting you 12 fire resistance. If you took 40 damage from a @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Fireball]{Fireball}, you'd reduce the damage to 28 from the fire resistance. If you then used Shield Bock, you would take 17 fire damage, and your shield, which had 12 fire resistance of its own, would take only 5 fire damage. You can imbue a suit of armor with this property multiple times, though each time you do, you must choose a different type of energy damage, and each one counts separately against the armor's imbuing limit.

Evil.name: 邪恶 Evil
Evil.text:
邪恶

塑能

魔法

类型 武器

部件 怪物必须具有邪恶特性，或拥有造成邪恶伤害的攻击或法术。

效果 你将武器灌注以卑劣、腐化的邪恶，以击败正义的敌人。

路线 魔法；此灌注属性所授予的法术始终为神圣

  • 2级 该武器可以将@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Divine Lance]{Divine Lance}作为戏法施放，只造成邪恶伤害，且以物品等级的一半（向上取整）进行升阶
  • 4级 该武器每天可以施放一次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Protection]{Protection}，仅防护善良
  • 8级 该武器每天可以施放一次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Chilling Darkness]{Chilling Darkness}
  • 10级 该武器每天可以施放一次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Divine Wrath]{Divine Wrath}（仅邪恶）
  • 12级 使用该武器的打击额外造成1点邪恶伤害
  • 14级 额外的邪恶伤害提高至1d4
  • 16级 该武器可以施放@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Divine Decree]{Divine Decree}（仅邪恶）。该武器的divine wrath升阶至5级
  • 18级 额外的邪恶伤害提高至1d6
  • 20级 该武器可以施放@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Divine Aura]{Divine Aura}（仅邪恶），该武器的divine decree升阶至8级，且该武器的divine wrath升阶至7级。

路线 威能

  • 6级 使用该武器的打击额外造成1点邪恶伤害
  • 8级 额外的邪恶伤害提高至1d4
  • 10级 额外的邪恶伤害提高至1d6
  • 12级 对善良生物造成大成功或大失败命中时，你造成1d10 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Persistent Damage]{Persistent bleed Damage}
  • 14级 此灌注属性造成的邪恶伤害无视抗力
  • 18级 额外的邪恶伤害提高至1d8
  • 20级 以该武器进行一次成功的打击时，在结算邪恶伤害之前，一个善良的目标获得对善良的弱点1，持续至你下个回合开始

路线 技法

  • 6级 使用该武器的打击额外造成1点邪恶伤害
  • 8级 使用该武器的打击造成1点持续邪恶伤害
  • 10级 持续邪恶伤害提高至1d6
  • 12级 对善良生物造成大成功或大失败命中时，该生物还会承受1d10 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Persistent Damage]{Persistent bleed Damage}
  • 14级 此灌注属性造成的伤害（包括持续流血伤害与邪恶伤害）无视抗力
  • 16级 对善良生物造成大成功或大失败命中时，其变为@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 1}
  • 18级 命中时的持续邪恶伤害提高至1d10
  • 20级 该属性的持续邪恶伤害会使善良敌人保持惊惧。只要其受到持续邪恶伤害影响，善良生物在其回合结束时无法将其惊惧（状态）降低到1以下

Evil

Evocation

Magical

Type Weapon

Parts The monster must have the evil trait or an attack or spell that deals evil damage.

Effect You imbue the weapon with vile corrupt evil to defeat virtuous foes.

Path Magic; The spells granted by this imbued property are always divine

  • 2nd The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Divine Lance]{Divine Lance} as a cantrip, dealing evil damage only, heightened to half the item's level rounded up
  • 4th The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Protection]{Protection} once per day, protecting against good only
  • 8th The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Chilling Darkness]{Chilling Darkness} once per day
  • 10th The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Divine Wrath]{Divine Wrath} (evil only) once per day
  • 12th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional evil damage
  • 14th The additional evil damage increases to 1d4
  • 16th The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Divine Decree]{Divine Decree} (evil only). The weapon's divine wrath heightens to 5th level
  • 18th The additional evil damage increases to 1d6
  • 20th The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Divine Aura]{Divine Aura} (evil only), the weapon's divine decree heightens to 8th level, and the weapon's divine wrath heightens to 7th level.

Path Might

  • 6th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional evil damage
  • 8th The additional evil damage increases to 1d4
  • 10th The additional evil damage increases to 1d6
  • 12th On a critical hit against a good creature, you deal 1d10 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Persistent Damage]{Persistent bleed Damage}
  • 14th The evil damage dealt by this imbued property ignores resistances
  • 18th The additional evil damage increases to 1d8
  • 20th On a successful Strike with the weapon, before applying evil damage, a good target gains weakness 1 to good until the beginning of your next turn

Path Technique

  • 6th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional evil damage
  • 8th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 persistent evil damage
  • 10th The persistent evil damage increases to 1d6
  • 12th On a critical hit against a good creature, the creature also takes 1d10 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Persistent Damage]{Persistent bleed Damage}
  • 14th The damage dealt by this imbued property (including persistent bleed damage and evil damage) ignores resistances
  • 16th On a critical hit against a good creature, they become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 1}
  • 18th The persistent evil damage on a hit increases to 1d10
  • 20th The property's persistent evil damage keeps good foes frightened. As long as they are affected by the persistent evil damage, a good creature can't reduce its frightened condition below 1 at the end of its turn

Fire.name: 火 Fire
Fire.text:
类型 武器

部件 该怪物必须具有火焰（特征），或拥有造成火焰伤害的攻击或法术。

效果 你将燃烧的火焰灌注于该武器之中。

路径 魔法；你首次灌注该武器时，选择所授予的法术为奥术或原初

  • 2级 该武器可以将@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Produce Flame]{Produce Flame}作为戏法施放，并升阶至该物品等级的一半（向上取整）
  • 4级 该武器每天可施放一次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Burning Hands]{Burning Hands}
  • 6级 该武器的burning hands升阶至2级
  • 8级 该武器每天可各施放一次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Flaming Sphere]{Flaming Sphere}与@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Fireball]{Fireball}，但不再能施放burning hands
  • 10级 使用该武器进行的打击造成额外1点火焰伤害
  • 12级 该武器的fireball与flaming sphere升阶至4级，并且该武器每天可施放一次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Wall of Fire]{Wall of Fire}
  • 14级 额外火焰伤害增加至1d4
  • 16级 该武器的fireball、flaming sphere与wall of fire升阶至6级
  • 18级 额外火焰伤害增加至1d6
  • 20级 该武器每天可施放一次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Meteor Swarm]{Meteor Swarm}

路径 力量

  • 4级 使用该武器进行的打击造成额外1点火焰伤害
  • 6级 额外火焰伤害增加至1d4
  • 8级 额外火焰伤害增加至1d6。若大成功，使用该武器进行的打击造成1d10 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Persistent Damage]{Persistent Fire Damage}
  • 12级 由该灌注属性造成的火焰伤害（包括持续性火焰伤害）无视抗力
  • 14级 大成功时的持续性火焰伤害增加至2d10
  • 18级 额外火焰伤害增加至1d8
  • 20级 以该武器成功进行一次打击时，在结算火焰伤害之前，目标获得火焰弱点1，持续至你下一回合开始

路径 技巧

  • 4级 使用该武器进行的打击造成1点持续性火焰伤害
  • 6级 使用该武器进行的打击造成额外1点火焰伤害
  • 8级 持续性火焰伤害增加至1d6。若大成功，该武器额外造成1d10 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Persistent Damage]{Persistent Fire Damage}。（大成功时的额外持续性火焰伤害会与常规持续性火焰伤害叠加；并且如常规规则所述，你仅在将常规持续性火焰伤害翻倍后再加入该额外持续性火焰伤害）
  • 12级 由该灌注属性造成的火焰伤害（包括持续性火焰伤害）无视抗力
  • 14级 命中时的持续性火焰伤害增加至1d8
  • 16级 当前正受该灌注属性所造成的持续性火焰伤害影响的敌人会因燃烧而分心，使其@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Flat-Footed]{Flat-Footed}
  • 18级 命中时的持续性火焰伤害增加至1d10
  • 20级 在一个燃烧中的敌人回合结束时，当其因该灌注属性的持续性火焰伤害而受到伤害时，所有与该敌人相邻的敌人也会被点燃，同样承受等量的持续性火焰伤害

Type Weapon

Parts The monster must have the fire trait or an attack or spell that deals fire damage.

Effect You imbue the weapon with burning fire.

Path Magic; Choose when you first imbue the weapon for the granted spells to be either arcane or primal

  • 2nd The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Produce Flame]{Produce Flame} as a cantrip, heightened to half the item's level rounded up
  • 4th The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Burning Hands]{Burning Hands} once per day
  • 6th The weapon's burning hands heightens to 2nd level
  • 8th The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Flaming Sphere]{Flaming Sphere} and @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Fireball]{Fireball} each once per day, but no longer can cast burning hands
  • 10th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional fire damage
  • 12th The weapon's fireball and flaming sphere heighten to 4th level, and the weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Wall of Fire]{Wall of Fire} once per day
  • 14th The additional fire damage increases to 1d4
  • 16th The weapon's fireball, flaming sphere, and wall of fire heighten to 6th level
  • 18th The additional fire damage increases to 1d6
  • 20th The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Meteor Swarm]{Meteor Swarm} once per day

Path Might

  • 4th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional fire damage
  • 6th The additional fire damage increases to 1d4
  • 8th The additional fire damage increases to 1d6. On a critical hit, Strikes with the weapon deal 1d10 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Persistent Damage]{Persistent Fire Damage}
  • 12th The fire damage dealt by this imbued property (including persistent fire damage) ignores resistances
  • 14th The persistent fire damage on a critical hit increases to 2d10
  • 18th The additional fire damage increases to 1d8
  • 20th On a successful Strike with the weapon, before applying fire damage, the target gains weakness 1 to fire until the beginning of your next turn

Path Technique

  • 4th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 persistent fire damage
  • 6th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional fire damage
  • 8th The persistent fire damage increases to 1d6. On a critical hit, the weapon deals an additional 1d10 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Persistent Damage]{Persistent Fire Damage}. (The additional persistent fire damage on a critical hit is cumulative with the regular persistent fire damage, and as normal you add it in only after doubling the regular persistent fire damage)
  • 12th The fire damage dealt by this imbued property (including persistent fire damage) ignores resistances
  • 14th The persistent fire damage on a hit increases to 1d8
  • 16th Foes currently affected by persistent fire damage from the imbued property are distracted as they burn, making them @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Flat-Footed]{Flat-Footed}
  • 18th The persistent fire damage on a hit increases to 1d10
  • 20th At the end of a burning foe's turn, when they take damage from the imbued property's persistent fire damage, all foes adjacent to that foe are set on fire as well, taking the same amount of persistent fire damage

Force.name: 力场 Force
Force.text:
塑能

力场

魔法

类型 武器

组件 该怪物必须具有力场（特征），或具有造成力场伤害的攻击或法术。

效果 你将纯粹的力场灌注入该武器。

路径 魔法；你首次灌注该武器时选择，使所授予的法术为奥术、神术或秘术之一

  • 2级 该武器可以将@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Shield]{Shield}作为戏法施放，升阶至该物品等级的一半（向上取整）
  • 4级 该武器每天可以施放1次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Magic Missile]{Magic Missile}
  • 6级 该武器每天可以施放1次magic missile或@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Spiritual Weapon]{Spiritual Weapon}（二者不可兼得）
  • 8级 该武器的magic missile升阶至3级，且每天可以各施放1次magic missile与spiritual weapon
  • 10级 使用该武器进行的打击造成额外1点力场伤害
  • 12级 该武器的spiritual weapon升阶至4级，且该武器每天可以施放1次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.jQdm301h6e8hIY4U]{Spiritual Guardian}
  • 14级 额外力场伤害提高至1d4
  • 16级 该武器的magic missile升阶至5级，spiritual guardian升阶至6级，且该武器每天可以施放1次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.PHVHBbdHeQRfjLmE]{Spirit Blast}，但其不再能施放spiritual weapon
  • 18级 额外力场伤害提高至1d6
  • 20级 该武器每天可以施放1次9级@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Spirit Song]{Spirit Song}

路径 威能

  • 4级 使用该武器进行的打击造成额外1点力场伤害
  • 6级 额外力场伤害提高至1d4
  • 8级 额外力场伤害提高至1d6
  • 10级 在一次大成功命中时，你可以选择迫使目标在强韧豁免上成功，否则被推开5尺远离你
  • 12级 此灌注属性造成的力场伤害无视抗力
  • 16级 在一次大成功命中且强韧豁免失败时，你可以将敌人推开10尺远离你
  • 18级 额外力场伤害提高至1d8
  • 20级 使用该武器打击成功时，在结算力场伤害之前，目标获得对力场的弱点1，持续至你下个回合开始

路径 技巧

  • 4级 使用该武器进行的打击造成1点持续力场伤害
  • 6级 使用该武器进行的打击造成额外1点力场伤害
  • 8级 在一次大成功命中时，你可以选择迫使目标在强韧豁免上成功，否则被推开5尺远离你
  • 10级 持续力场伤害提高至1d6
  • 12级 此灌注属性造成的力场伤害（包括持续力场伤害）无视抗力
  • 14级 在一次大成功命中且强韧豁免失败时，你可以将敌人推开至多10尺远离你
  • 16级 当前正受此灌注属性造成的持续力场伤害影响的敌人会被向各个方向击飞，使其成为@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Flat-Footed]{Flat-Footed}
  • 18级 在一次大成功命中且强韧豁免失败时，你可以将敌人推开至多20尺远离你
  • 20级 在敌人回合结束时，若其未能移除此灌注属性造成的持续力场伤害，则其必须在一次强韧豁免上成功，否则被击倒为@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone}

Evocation

Force

Magical

Type Weapon

Parts The monster must have the force trait or an attack or spell that deals force damage.

Effect You imbue the weapon with pure force.

Path Magic; Choose when you first imbue the weapon for the granted spells to be either arcane, divine, or occult

  • 2nd The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Shield]{Shield} as a cantrip, heightened to half the item's level rounded up
  • 4th The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Magic Missile]{Magic Missile} once per day
  • 6th The weapon can cast either magic missile or @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Spiritual Weapon]{Spiritual Weapon} once per day not both
  • 8th The weapon's magic missile heightens to 3rd level and it can cast both magic missile and spiritual weapon once day
  • 10th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional force damage
  • 12th The weapon's spiritual weapon heightens to 4th level, and the weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.jQdm301h6e8hIY4U]{Spiritual Guardian} once per day
  • 14th The additional force damage increases to 1d4
  • 16th The weapon's magic missile heightens to 5th level, spiritual guardian heightens to 6th level, and the weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.PHVHBbdHeQRfjLmE]{Spirit Blast} once per day, but it can no longer cast spiritual weapon
  • 18th The additional force damage increases to 1d6
  • 20th The weapon can cast 9th-level @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Spirit Song]{Spirit Song} once per day

Path Might

  • 4th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional force damage
  • 6th The additional force damage increases to 1d4
  • 8th The additional force damage increases to 1d6
  • 10th On a critical hit, you can choose to force the target to succeed at Fortitude save or be pushed 5 feet away from you
  • 12th The force damage dealt by this imbued property ignores resistances
  • 16th On a critical hit and a failed Fortitude save, you can push the foe 10 feet away from you
  • 18th The additional force damage increases to 1d8
  • 20th On a successful Strike with the weapon, before applying force damage, the target gains weakness 1 to force until the beginning of your next turn

Path Technique

  • 4th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 persistent force damage
  • 6th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional force damage
  • 8th On a critical hit, you can choose to force the target to succeed at Fortitude save or be pushed 5 feet away from you
  • 10th The persistent force damage increases to 1d6
  • 12th The force damage dealt by this imbued property (including persistent force damage) ignores resistances
  • 14th On a critical hit and a failed Fortitude save, you can push the foe up to 10 feet away from you
  • 16th Foes currently affected by persistent force damage from the imbued property are knocked about in all directions, making them @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Flat-Footed]{Flat-Footed}
  • 18th On a critical hit and a failed Fortitude save, you can push the foe up to 20 feet away from you
  • 20th At the end of a foe's turn, if it fails to remove the persistent force damage from the imbued property, it must succeed at a Fortitude save or be knocked @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone}

Fortification.name: 要塞化 Fortification
Fortification.text:
防护

魔法

类型 护甲（必须为中甲或重甲）

部件 该怪物必须具有对精准伤害或重击的抗力或免疫。

效果 你以强大的加固为护甲灌注力量，以抵御致命攻击。此灌注的属性使护甲变厚，使其负载增加1，并使降低其减值所需的力量提高2。当该灌注属性至少为第6等级时，你每次在穿着刻蚀过的护甲时受到重击，进行一次 @Check[type:flat|dc:20|name:Fortification]。若成功，则该次重击改为普通命中。该纯骰检定的DC在第8等级时降低1，之后每提高2等级再降低1，最低降至第20等级时的DC 13。

Abjuration

Magical

Type Armor (must be medium or heavy)

Parts The monster must have resistance or immunity to precision damage or critical hits.

Effect You imbue the armor with powerful fortifications to ward off deadly attacks. This imbued property thickens the armor, increasing its Bulk by 1 and the Strength required to reduce its penalties by 2. When the imbued property is at least 6th level, each time you're critically hit while wearing the etched armor, attempt a @Check[type:flat|dc:20|name:Fortification]. On a success, it becomes a normal hit. The flat check's DC decreases by 1 at 8th level and every 2 levels thereafter, to a minimum of DC 13 at 20th level.

Good.name: 很好 Good
Good.text:
塑能

善良

魔法

类型 武器

部件 该怪物必须具有善良特征，或拥有造成善良伤害的攻击或法术。

效果 你将纯粹而高尚的善良灌注于该武器，以击败邪恶的敌人。

路径 魔法；该灌注属性授予的法术恒为神术

  • 2级 该武器可以将@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Divine Lance]{Divine Lance}作为戏法施放，仅造成善良伤害；其增幅至物品等级的一半（向上取整）
  • 4级 该武器每天一次可以施放@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Protection]{Protection}，仅防护邪恶
  • 8级 该武器每天一次可以施放@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Searing Light]{Searing Light}
  • 10级 该武器每天一次可以施放@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Divine Wrath]{Divine Wrath}（仅善良）
  • 12级 用该武器的打击造成额外1点善良伤害
  • 14级 额外的善良伤害提升至1d4
  • 16级 该武器可以施放@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Divine Decree]{Divine Decree}（仅善良）。该武器的divine wrath增幅至5级
  • 18级 额外的善良伤害提升至1d6
  • 20级 该武器可以施放@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Divine Aura]{Divine Aura}（仅善良），该武器的divine decree增幅至8级，且该武器的divine wrath增幅至7级

路径 威能

  • 6级 用该武器的打击造成额外1点善良伤害
  • 8级 额外的善良伤害提升至1d4
  • 10级 额外的善良伤害提升至1d6
  • 12级 对邪恶生物造成大成功攻击命中时，你保护他人免受作恶者的攻击。在你下个回合结束前，其对除你以外生物的攻击掷骰承受-2状态减值
  • 14级 该灌注属性造成的善良伤害无视抗力
  • 18级 额外的善良伤害提升至1d8
  • 20级 以该武器成功打击时，在结算善良伤害前，一个邪恶目标获得对善良的弱点1，持续至你下个回合开始

路径 技艺

  • 6级 用该武器的打击造成额外1点善良伤害
  • 8级 用该武器的打击造成额外1点持续性善良伤害
  • 10级 持续性善良伤害提升至1d6
  • 12级 对邪恶生物造成大成功攻击命中时，你保护他人免受作恶者的攻击。在你下个回合结束前，其对除你以外生物的攻击掷骰承受-1状态减值
  • 14级 该灌注属性造成的善良伤害（包括持续性善良伤害）无视抗力
  • 16级 对邪恶生物造成大成功攻击命中时，你保护他人免受作恶者的攻击。若其在你下个回合结束前攻击并伤害了除你以外的生物，则其在你下个回合结束前对你以灌注武器进行的攻击成为措手不及
  • 18级 命中时的持续性善良伤害提升至1d10
  • 20级 伤害无辜者会加速邪恶生物承受该武器持续性伤害的节奏。每当其攻击并伤害除你以外的生物时，它会受到该灌注属性的1d10持续性伤害，然后进行通常在其回合结束时才会进行的、用于移除持续性伤害的纯骰检定

Evocation

Good

Magical

Type Weapon

Parts The monster must have the good trait or an attack or spell that deals good damage.

Effect You imbue the weapon with pure and virtuous good to defeat wicked foes.

Path Magic; The spells granted by this imbued property are always divine

  • 2nd The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Divine Lance]{Divine Lance} as a cantrip, dealing good damage only, heightened to half the item's level rounded up
  • 4th The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Protection]{Protection} once per day, protecting against evil only
  • 8th The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Searing Light]{Searing Light} once per day
  • 10th The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Divine Wrath]{Divine Wrath} (good only) once per day
  • 12th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional good damage
  • 14th The additional good damage increases to 1d4
  • 16th The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Divine Decree]{Divine Decree} (good only). The weapon's divine wrath heightens to 5th level
  • 18th The additional good damage increases to 1d6
  • 20th The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Divine Aura]{Divine Aura} (good only), the weapon's divine decree heightens to 8th level, and the weapon's divine wrath heightens to 7th level

Path Might

  • 6th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional good damage
  • 8th The additional good damage increases to 1d4
  • 10th The additional good damage increases to 1d6
  • 12th On a critical hit against an evil creature, you protect others from the evildoer's attacks. They take a -2 status penalty on attack rolls against creatures other than you until the end of your next turn
  • 14th The good damage dealt by this imbued property ignores resistances
  • 18th The additional good damage increases to 1d8
  • 20th On a successful Strike with the weapon, before applying good damage, an evil target gains weakness 1 to good until the beginning of your next turn

Path Technique

  • 6th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional good damage
  • 8th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 persistent good damage
  • 10th The persistent good damage increases to 1d6
  • 12th On a critical hit against an evil creature, you protect others from the evildoer's attacks. They take a -1 status penalty on attack rolls against creatures other than you until the end of your next turn
  • 14th The good damage dealt by this imbued property (including persistent good damage) ignores resistances
  • 16th On a critical hit against an evil creature, you protect others from the evildoer's attacks. If they attack and damage a creature other than you before the end of your next turn, they become flat- footed against your attacks with the imbued weapon until the end of your next turn
  • 18th The persistent good damage on a hit increases to 1d10
  • 20th Damaging innocents accelerates the pace of an evil creature's persistent damage from the weapon. Each time it attacks and damages a creature other than you, it takes the imbued property's 1d10 persistent damage and then attempts the flat check to remove the persistent damage that normally happens at the end of its turn

Intelligence.name: 智力 Intelligence
Intelligence.text:
预言

魔法

类型 技能物品（基于智力的技能）

组成 该生物必须将智力作为其最高或第二高的能力调整值

效果 你将辉煌的智力灌注进该物品。

  • 8环 该物品每天一次可以以异能法术施放@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Hypercognition]{Hypercognition}，你的内在魅力激励你或一名盟友成就伟业
  • 14环 该物品每小时一次可以施放hypercognition，而非每天一次
  • 17环 当你灌注该物品时，你要么使你的智力属性值提高2点，要么将其提高至18，以能让你获得更高属性值者为准。该物品获得巅峰（特征）特性
  • 20环 该物品每分钟一次可以施放hypercognition，而非每小时一次。

Divination

Magical

Type Skill Item (Intelligence-based skill)

Parts The creature must have Intelligence as its highest or second- highest ability modifier

Effect You imbue the item with brilliant intelligence.

  • 8th The item can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Hypercognition]{Hypercognition} once per day as an occult spell, as your inner Charisma inspires you or an ally to greatness
  • 14th The item can cast hypercognition once per hour instead of once per day
  • 17th When you invest the item, you either increase your Intelligence score by 2 or increase it to 18, whichever would give you a higher score. The item gains the apex trait
  • 20th The item can cast hypercognition once per minute instead of once per hour.

Lawful.name: 守序 Lawful
Lawful.text:
塑能

守序

魔法

类型 武器

组件 该怪物必须具有守序特征，或拥有造成守序伤害的攻击或法术。

效果 你将武器灌注以森严的律法，以击败不守规矩的敌人。

路径 魔法；由此灌注属性所赋予的法术始终为神术

  • 2级 该武器可以将@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Divine Lance]{Divine Lance}作为戏法施放，仅造成守序伤害，其强化至该物品等级的一半（向上取整）
  • 4级 该武器每天可以施放一次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Protection]{Protection}，且仅防护混沌
  • 8级 该武器每天可以施放一次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Searing Light]{Searing Light}，但其基础伤害为电击而非火焰；它改为对混沌的天界生物、监察者与邪魔造成额外守序伤害，而非对邪魔与不死生物造成额外善良伤害；并且它具有电击与守序特征，而非火焰与善良特征
  • 10级 该武器每天可以施放一次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Divine Wrath]{Divine Wrath}（仅守序）
  • 12级 以该武器进行的打击造成额外1点守序伤害
  • 14级 额外守序伤害提升至2点
  • 16级 该武器可以施放@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Divine Decree]{Divine Decree}（仅守序）。该武器的divine wrath强化至5级
  • 18级 额外守序伤害提升至3点
  • 20级 该武器可以施放@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Divine Aura]{Divine Aura}（仅守序），该武器的divine decree强化至8级，且该武器的divine wrath强化至7级

路径 威能

  • 6级 以该武器进行的打击造成额外1点守序伤害
  • 8级 额外守序伤害提升至2点
  • 10级 额外守序伤害提升至3点
  • 12级 对混沌生物造成一次大成功或大失败打击时，你限制其行动，使其获得@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{笨拙 1}直到你下个回合结束
  • 14级 此灌注属性造成的守序伤害无视抗力
  • 18级 额外守序伤害提升至5点
  • 20级 使用该武器进行一次成功打击时，在结算守序伤害前，一个混沌目标获得对守序的弱点1，直到你下个回合开始

路径 技巧

  • 6级 以该武器进行的打击造成额外1点守序伤害
  • 8级 以该武器进行的打击造成1点持续性守序伤害
  • 10级 持续性守序伤害提升至3点
  • 12级 对混沌生物造成一次大成功或大失败打击时，你限制其行动，使其获得笨拙 1直到你下个回合结束
  • 14级 此灌注属性造成的守序伤害（包括持续性守序伤害）无视抗力
  • 16级 对混沌生物造成一次大成功或大失败打击时，其获得@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{笨拙 2}直到你下个回合结束，而非笨拙 1
  • 18级 持续性守序伤害提升至5点
  • 20级 当你造成一次大成功或大失败打击时，你将秩序强加于混沌之上。你可以命令目标靠近你、逃跑（如同其具有@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fleeing]{逃跑（状态）}）、放开其手中所持物、卧倒@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{倒地}、或原地不动。在其服从你的命令之前，它不能延迟或进行任何反应动作（）。其效果取决于目标的意志豁免。成功时，该生物不受影响。失败时，在其下个回合的第一个动作中，该生物必须使用一个单动作来照你所命令的去做。大成功或大失败时，目标必须在其下个回合使用其所有动作来服从你的命令。这是一个听觉、惑控、语言与心灵效果

Evocation

Lawful

Magical

Type Weapon

Parts The monster must have the lawful trait or an attack or spell that deals lawful damage.

Effect You imbue the weapon with rigid law to defeat unruly foes.

Path Magic; The spells granted by this imbued property are always divine

  • 2nd The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Divine Lance]{Divine Lance} as a cantrip, dealing lawful damage only, heightened to half the item's level rounded up
  • 4th The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Protection]{Protection} once per day, protecting against chaotic only
