  • 8th The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Searing Light]{Searing Light} once per day, except the base damage is electricity instead of fire, it deals additional lawful damage to chaotic celestials, monitors, and fiends instead of dealing additional good damage to fiends and undead, and it has the electricity and lawful traits instead of fire and good
  • 10th The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Divine Wrath]{Divine Wrath} (lawful only) once per day
  • 12th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional lawful damage
  • 14th The additional lawful damage increases to 2
  • 16th The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Divine Decree]{Divine Decree} (lawful only). The weapon's divine wrath heightens to 5th level
  • 18th The additional lawful damage increases to 3
  • 20th The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Divine Aura]{Divine Aura} (lawful only), the weapon's divine decree heightens to 8th level, and the weapon's divine wrath heightens to 7th level

Path Might

  • 6th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional lawful damage
  • 8th The additional lawful damage increases to 2
  • 10th The additional lawful damage increases to 3
  • 12th On a critical hit against a chaotic creature, you restrict its motions, making it @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{Clumsy 1} until the end of your next turn
  • 14th The lawful damage dealt by this imbued property ignores resistances
  • 18th The additional lawful damage increases to 5
  • 20th On a successful Strike with the weapon, before applying lawful damage, a chaotic target gains weakness 1 to lawful until the beginning of your next turn

Path Technique

  • 6th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional lawful damage
  • 8th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 persistent lawful damage
  • 10th The persistent lawful damage increases to 3
  • 12th On a critical hit against a chaotic creature, you restrict its motions, making it clumsy 1 until the end of your next turn
  • 14th The lawful damage dealt by this imbued property (including persistent lawful damage) ignores resistances
  • 16th On a critical hit against a chaotic creature, they become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{Clumsy 2} until the end of your next turn instead of clumsy 1
  • 18th The persistent lawful damage increases to 5
  • 20th On a critical hit, you impose order upon chaos. You can command the target to approach you, run away (as if it had the @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fleeing]{Fleeing} condition), release what it's holding, drop @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone}, or stand in place. It can't Delay or take any reactions until it has obeyed your command. The effects depend on the target's Will save. On a success, the creature is unaffected. On a failure, for the first action on its next turn, the creature must use a single action to do as you command. On a critical failure, the target must use all its actions on its next turn to obey your command. This is an auditory, enchantment, linguistic, and mental effect

Mental.name: 精神 Mental
Mental.text:
塑能

魔法

心灵（特征）

类型 武器

部件 怪物必须具有星界或心灵（特征），或具有带有这些特征的攻击或法术。

效果 你将心灵力量灌注入武器。

路线 魔法；你首次灌注武器时选择，使所授予的法术为奥术或秘术

  • 2级 该武器可以将@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Daze]{Daze}作为戏法施放，升阶至该物品等级的一半（向上取整）
  • 4级 该武器每天可以施放一次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Phantom Pain]{Phantom Pain}
  • 6级 该武器的phantom pain升阶至2环，且该武器每天可以施放一次phantom pain或@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Warrior's Regret]{Warrior's Regret}（二者不可兼得）
  • 8级 该武器的phantom pain与warrior's regret各自升阶至3环，且它每天可以施放一次phantom pain与warrior's regret
  • 10级 用该武器进行的打击造成额外1点心灵伤害
  • 12级 该武器的phantom pain与warrior's regret升阶至4环，且该武器每天可以施放一次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Phantasmal Killer]{Phantasmal Killer}
  • 14级 额外心灵伤害提升至1d4
  • 16级 该武器的phantom pain与phantasmal killer升阶至6环，且该武器每天可以施放一次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Phantasmal Calamity]{Phantasmal Calamity}，但它不再能施放warrior's regret
  • 18级 额外心灵伤害提升至1d6
  • 20级 该武器每天可以施放一次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Weird]{Weird}

路线 力量

  • 4级 用该武器进行的打击造成额外1点心灵伤害；
  • 6级 额外心灵伤害提升至1d4
  • 8级 额外心灵伤害提升至1d6
  • 10级 在大成功命中时，目标获得@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{呆滞（状态） 1}，持续1轮
  • 12级 该灌注属性造成的心灵伤害无视抗力
  • 16级 在大成功命中时，目标获得@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{呆滞（状态） 2}，持续1轮
  • 18级 额外心灵伤害提升至1d8
  • 20级 用该武器成功打击时，在结算心灵伤害之前，目标获得心灵弱点1，持续至你下个回合开始

路线 技法

  • 4级 用该武器进行的打击造成1点持续心灵伤害
  • 6级 用该武器进行的打击造成额外1点心灵伤害
  • 8级 在大成功命中时，目标获得呆滞（状态）1，持续1轮
  • 10级 持续心灵伤害提升至1d6
  • 12级 该灌注属性造成的心灵伤害（包括持续心灵伤害）无视抗力
  • 14级 命中时的持续心灵伤害提升至1d8
  • 16级 在大成功命中时，目标获得呆滞（状态）2，持续1轮
  • 18级 命中时的持续心灵伤害提升至1d10
  • 20级 当敌人因该灌注属性而承受持续心灵伤害期间，由大成功命中造成的呆滞（状态）持续至持续伤害结束或持续1轮，以较长者为准

Evocation

Magical

Mental

Type Weapon

Parts The monster must have the astral or mental trait or an attack or spell with these traits.

Effect You imbue the weapon with psychic power.

Path Magic; Choose when you first imbue the weapon for the granted spells to be either arcane or occult

  • 2nd The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Daze]{Daze} as a cantrip, heightened to half the item's level rounded up
  • 4th The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Phantom Pain]{Phantom Pain} once per day
  • 6th The weapon's phantom pain is heightened to 2nd-level, and the weapon can cast either phantom pain or @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Warrior's Regret]{Warrior's Regret} once per day not both
  • 8th The weapon's phantom pain and warrior's regret each heightens to 3rd level and it can cast both phantom pain and warrior's regret once day
  • 10th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional mental damage
  • 12th The weapon's phantom pain and warrior's regret heighten to 4th level, and the weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Phantasmal Killer]{Phantasmal Killer} once per day
  • 14th The additional mental damage increases to 1d4
  • 16th The weapon's phantom pain and phantasmal killer heighten to 6th level, and the weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Phantasmal Calamity]{Phantasmal Calamity} once per day, but it can no longer cast warrior's regret
  • 18th The additional mental damage increases to 1d6
  • 20th The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Weird]{Weird} once per day

Path Might

  • 4th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional mental damage;
  • 6th The additional mental damage increases to 1d4
  • 8th The additional mental damage increases to 1d6
  • 10th On a critical hit, the target is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round
  • 12th The mental damage dealt by this imbued property ignores resistances
  • 16th On a critical hit, the target is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 2} for 1 round
  • 18th The additional mental damage increases to 1d8
  • 20th On a successful Strike with the weapon, before applying mental damage, the target gains weakness 1 to mental until the beginning of your next turn

Path Technique

  • 4th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 persistent mental damage
  • 6th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional mental damage
  • 8th On a critical hit, the target is stupefied 1 for 1 round
  • 10th The persistent mental damage increases to 1d6
  • 12th The mental damage dealt by this imbued property (including persistent mental damage) ignores resistances
  • 14th The persistent mental damage on a hit increases to 1d8
  • 16th On a critical hit, the target is stupefied 2 for 1 round
  • 18th The persistent mental damage on a hit increases to 1d10
  • 20th While the foe has persistent mental damage from the imbued property, the stupefied condition from a critical hit lasts until the persistent damage ends or for 1 round, whichever is longer

Negative.name: 负面 Negative
Negative.text:
塑能

魔法

负能量

类型 武器

组件 该怪物必须具有负能量或不死（特征）特征，或拥有造成负能量伤害的攻击或法术。

效果 你将负能量、宇宙性的毁灭灌注进武器。

路径 魔法；当你首次灌注该武器时选择，使获得的法术为神术或原能法术

  • 2级 该武器可以将@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Chill Touch]{Chill Touch}作为戏法施放，升阶至该物品等级的一半（向上取整）
  • 4级 该武器每天可以施放一次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Harm]{Harm}
  • 6级 该武器的harm升阶至2环法术，且该武器每天可以施放一次harm或@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Sudden Blight]{Sudden Blight}，但不能两者都施放
  • 8级 该武器的harm与sudden blight各自升阶至3环法术，且它每天可以各施放一次harm与sudden blight
  • 10级 用该武器进行的打击造成额外1点负能量伤害
  • 12级 该武器的harm与sudden blight升阶至4环法术，且该武器每天可以施放一次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Enervation]{Enervation}
  • 14级 额外负能量伤害提高至1d4
  • 16级 该武器的enervation与harm升阶至6环法术，且该武器每天可以施放一次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.6lO6uMQxbqmYho0e]{Necrotize}，但它不再能够施放sudden blight
  • 18级 额外负能量伤害提高至1d6
  • 20级 该武器每天可以施放一次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.FEsuyf203wTNE2et]{Wail of the Banshee}

路径 威能

  • 4级 用该武器进行的打击造成额外1点负能量伤害
  • 6级 额外负能量伤害提高至1d4
  • 8级 额外负能量伤害提高至1d6
  • 10级 在大成功或大失败命中时，目标获得@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Enfeebled]{力竭（状态） 1}，持续1轮
  • 12级 该灌注属性造成的负能量伤害无视抗力
  • 16级 在大成功或大失败命中时，目标获得@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Enfeebled]{力竭（状态） 2}，持续1轮
  • 18级 额外负能量伤害提高至1d8
  • 20级 当你用该武器一次成功的打击命中时，在结算负能量伤害之前，目标获得负能量弱点1，持续到你下个回合开始

路径 技巧

  • 4级 用该武器进行的打击造成1点持续性负能量伤害
  • 6级 用该武器进行的打击造成额外1点负能量伤害
  • 8级 在大成功或大失败命中时，目标获得@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭（状态） 1}，持续1轮
  • 10级 持续性负能量伤害提高至1d6
  • 12级 该灌注属性造成的负能量伤害（包括持续性负能量伤害）无视抗力
  • 14级 命中时造成的持续性负能量伤害提高至1d8
  • 16级 在大成功或大失败命中时，目标获得@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭（状态） 2}，持续1轮
  • 18级 命中时造成的持续性负能量伤害提高至1d10
  • 20级 当敌人因该灌注属性而承受持续性负能量伤害时，由大成功或大失败命中造成的力竭（状态）状态将持续到持续性伤害结束，或持续1轮，以较长者为准

Evocation

Magical

Negative

Type Weapon

Parts The monster must have the negative or undead trait or an attack or spell that deals negative damage.

Effect You imbue the weapon with negative energy, cosmological destruction.

Path Magic; Choose when you first imbue the weapon for the granted spells to be either divine or primal

  • 2nd The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Chill Touch]{Chill Touch} as a cantrip, heightened to half the item's level rounded up
  • 4th The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Harm]{Harm} once per day

  • 16th The weapon's enervation and harm heighten to 6th level, and the weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.6lO6uMQxbqmYho0e]{Necrotize} once per day, but it can no longer cast sudden blight
  • 18th The additional negative damage increases to 1d6
  • 20th The weapon can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.FEsuyf203wTNE2et]{Wail of the Banshee} once per day

Path Might

  • 6th The additional negative damage increases to 1d4

  • 10th On a critical hit, the target is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 round
  • 12th The negative damage dealt by this imbued property ignores resistances
  • 16th On a critical hit, the target is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 2} for 1 round
  • 18th The additional negative damage increases to 1d8
  • 20th On a successful Strike with the weapon, before applying negative damage, the target gains weakness 1 to negative until the beginning of your next turn

Path Technique

  • 6th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional negative damage
  • 8th On a critical hit, the target is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 round
  • 10th The persistent negative damage increases to 1d6
  • 12th The negative damage dealt by this imbued property (including persistent negative damage) ignores resistances
  • 14th The persistent negative damage on a hit increases to 1d8
  • 16th On a critical hit, the target is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} for 1 round

Poison.name: 毒素 Poison
Poison.text:
塑能

魔法

毒素

类型 武器

部件 该怪物必须具有毒素（特征），或拥有造成毒素伤害的攻击或法术。

效果 你将该武器灌注以有毒的毒液。

路径 魔法；在你第一次灌注该武器时选择，使所授予的法术为奥术或原始二者之一

  • 2环 该武器可以将@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Puff of Poison]{Puff of Poison}作为戏法施放，并以该物品等级的一半（向上取整）进行升阶
  • 4环 该武器每天可施放一次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Spider Sting]{Spider Sting}
  • 6环 该武器每天可施放一次2环@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Noxious Vapors]{Noxious Vapors}或spider sting，二者不可兼得
  • 8环 该武器的noxious vapors升阶至3环，并且它每天可各施放一次noxious vapors、@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Imp Sting]{Imp Sting}与spider sting
  • 10环 用该武器进行的打击额外造成1点毒素伤害
  • 12环 该武器的noxious vapors升阶至4环，且该武器每天可施放一次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Swarming Wasp Stings]{Swarming Wasp Stings}
  • 14环 额外毒素伤害提高至1d4
  • 16环 该武器的noxious vapors升阶至6环，且该武器每天可施放一次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Purple Worm Sting]{Purple Worm Sting}
  • 18环 额外毒素伤害提高至1d6
  • 20环 该武器每天可施放一次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Linnorm Sting]{Linnorm Sting}

路径 力量

  • 4环 用该武器进行的打击额外造成1点毒素伤害
  • 6环 额外毒素伤害提高至1d4
  • 8环 额外毒素伤害提高至1d6。造成大成功时，目标受到1d10 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Persistent Damage]{持续毒素伤害}
  • 12环 此灌注属性造成的毒素伤害无视抗力
  • 14环 造成大成功时，持续毒素伤害提高至2d10
  • 18环 额外毒素伤害提高至1d8
  • 20环 当你用该武器进行打击并成功时，在结算毒素伤害之前，目标获得毒素弱点1，持续至你下个回合开始

路径 技法

  • 4环 用该武器进行的打击造成1点持续毒素伤害
  • 6环 用该武器进行的打击额外造成1点毒素伤害
  • 8环 持续毒素伤害提高至1d6。造成大成功时，目标额外受到1d10 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Persistent Damage]{持续毒素伤害}（如常规，大成功时额外的持续毒素伤害会与常规持续毒素伤害累加，并且你只在将常规持续毒素伤害加倍后才添加这部分额外持续毒素伤害）
  • 12环 此灌注属性造成的毒素伤害（包括持续毒素伤害）无视抗力
  • 14环 命中时的持续毒素伤害提高至1d8
  • 16环 在一个生物的回合结束时，若其仍未移除此灌注属性造成的持续毒素伤害，则选择笨拙、虚弱或迟钝。该生物获得所选状态，状态值为1；若其已具有该状态，则将状态值提高1，最大至3。若该生物在任何时候移除此属性的持续毒素伤害，这些状态立即结束。若你之后再次施加该毒素，你必须从状态值0重新开始
  • 18环 命中时的持续毒素伤害提高至1d10
  • 20环 造成大成功时，毒素会侵蚀你的敌人抵御进一步中毒的能力。其为@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Drained]{枯竭 1}

Evocation

Magical

Poison

Type Weapon

Path Magic; Choose when you first imbue the weapon for the granted spells to be either arcane or primal

The creature gains that condition with a condition value of 1, or increases the condition value by 1 if it already had that condition, to a maximum of 3. If the creature ever removes the persistent poison damage from this property, these conditions immediately end. If you reapply the poison later, you must start again from condition values of 0
  • 18th The persistent poison damage on a hit increases to 1d10
  • 20th On a critical hit, the poison eats away at your foe's ability to resist further poisoning. They are @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Drained]{Drained 1}

  • 18级 额外正能量伤害提升至1d8

  • 18级 命中时造成的持续正能量伤害提升至1d10
  • 20级 由于炽亮的正能量在其体内奔涌，因该注能属性而承受持续正能量伤害的生物难以通过负能量进行治疗。若某个负能量效果将导致该生物恢复生命值，它必须先以该注能属性的20级与DC 43进行一次反制效果。即使反制检定成功，恢复的生命值也减少1d10。在大成功时，该生物恢复全额

On a critical success, it's enfeebled 1 until the end of your next turn, on a success, it's @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 2} until then, on a failure, it's @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 3} until then, and on a critical failure, it's destroyed.   • 18th The additional positive damage increases to 1d8

Sensory.name: 感官 Sensory
Sensory.text:
预言

魔法

类型 察觉物品

部件 生物必须已具有该灌注属性将要给予的下一种感官（1-6等级为昏暗视觉，6-12为黑暗视觉（6-12），12-16为嗅觉（12-16），16-18为高等黑暗视觉（16- 18），以及真实视界（18-20））。

效果 你为该物品灌注非凡的感官。

  • 4th 每天一次，你可以以一个两动作的意念启动启动该物品，以获得昏暗视觉，持续1小时
  • 6th 当你注能该物品时，你获得昏暗视觉
  • 8th 每天一次，你可以以一个两动作的意念启动启动该物品，以获得黑暗视觉，持续1小时
  • 12th 当你注能该物品时，你获得黑暗视觉
  • 14th 每天一次，你可以以一个两动作的意念启动启动该物品，以获得30英尺不精确嗅觉，持续1小时
  • 16th 当你注能该物品时，你获得30英尺不精确嗅觉
  • 18th 当你注能该物品时，你获得高等黑暗视觉
  • 20th 当你注能该物品时，你持续获得6环@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.uqlxMQQeSGWEVjki]{真实视界}的效果

Divination

Magical

Type Perception Item

Parts The creature must have the next sense to be granted by the imbued property (low-light vision from levels 1-6, darkvision (6-12), scent (12-16), greater darkvision (16- 18), and true seeing(18-20)).

Effect You imbue the item with extraordinary senses.

  • 4th Once per day, you can activate the item as a two-action envision activation to gain low-light vision for 1 hour
  • 6th While investing the item, you gain low-light vision
  • 8th Once per day, you can activate the item as a two-action envision activation to gain darkvision for 1 hour
  • 12th While investing the item, you gain darkvision
  • 14th Once per day, you can activate the item as a two-action envision activation to gain 30-foot imprecise scent for 1 hour
  • 16th While investing the item, you gain 30-foot imprecise scent
  • 18th While investing the item, you gain greater darkvision
  • 20th While investing the item, you constantly gain the effects of 6th-level @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.uqlxMQQeSGWEVjki]{True Seeing}

  • 18级 命中时的持续性音波伤害提高至1d10
  • 20级 音波伤害与持续性音波伤害会制造音爆，影响所有与目标相邻且其AC小于或等于你攻击掷骰结果的生物。在大成功或大失败命中时，所有以此方式受到音波伤害的生物都必须尝试进行强韧豁免，以避免耳聋与昏迷

Spell.name: 法术 Spell
Spell.text:
魔法

类型 技能 物品

构成 该生物必须要么拥有与该技能物品相匹配的技能，要么能够施放所选的法术

效果 你将一个魔法法术灌注进该物品。你可以使用该技能所建议的法术之一，或与GM合作决定另一个法术。该法术不应是那种特别持久的法术，例如法师护甲；并且在授予只影响施法者本人的法术（例如真实打击）之前，你与GM应当谨慎考虑。选择一种能够施放你所选法术的魔法根源；该物品使用该根源施放该法术。在第4等级时，你可以灌注一个1环法术。在第6等级以及之后每提高2个等级，你可以灌注一个高1个法术环级的法术；若你保持同一个法术不变，则该法术会提高到新的最高环级。

每项技能的建议法术如下：

  • 特技 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Feather Fall]{Feather Fall}
  • 奥秘 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Magic Missile]{Magic Missile}
  • 运动 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Jump]{Jump}
  • 制作 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Mending]{Mending}
  • 欺骗 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Illusory Disguise]{Illusory Disguise}
  • 交涉 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Charm]{Charm}
  • 威吓 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Fear]{Fear}
  • 学识 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Share Lore]{Share Lore}（仅限与该物品相关的学识）
  • 医术 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Heal]{Heal}
  • 自然 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Summon Plant or Fungus]{Summon Plant or Fungus}
  • 神秘 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Object Reading]{Object Reading}
  • 表演 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Enthrall]{Enthrall}
  • 宗教 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Bless]{Bless}
  • 社交 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Mindlink]{Mindlink}
  • 潜行 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Invisibility]{Invisibility}
  • 生存 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Endure Elements]{Endure Elements}
  • 盗窃 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Knock]{Knock}
  • 第4等级 该法术最高可为1环
  • 第6等级 该法术最高可为2环
  • 第8等级 该法术最高可为3环
  • 第10等级 该法术最高可为4环
  • 第12等级 该法术最高可为5环
  • 第14等级 该法术最高可为6环
  • 第16等级 该法术最高可为7环
  • 第18等级 该法术最高可为8环
  • 第20等级 该法术最高可为9环

Magical

Type Skill Item

Parts The creature must either possess the skill matching the skill item or be capable of casting the chosen spell

Effect You imbue the item with a magic spell. You can either use one of the suggested spells for the given skill or work with the GM to determine another spell. The spell shouldn't be one that is particularly long-lasting like mage armor and you and the GM should think carefully before granting spells that only affect the caster like true strike. Choose a magical tradition that can cast the spell you chose; the item casts the spell using that tradition. At 4th level, you can imbue a 1st-level spell. At 6th level, and every 2 levels thereafter, you can imbue a spell of 1 spell level higher, and if you keep the same spell, the spells heightens to the new maximum level.

Suggested spells for each skill are as follows:

  • Acrobatics @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Feather Fall]{Feather Fall}
  • Arcana @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Magic Missile]{Magic Missile}
  • Athletics @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Jump]{Jump}
  • Crafting @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Mending]{Mending}
  • Deception @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Illusory Disguise]{Illusory Disguise}
  • Diplomacy @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Charm]{Charm}
  • Intimidation @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Fear]{Fear}
  • Lore @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Share Lore]{Share Lore} (Lore associated with the item only)
  • Medicine @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Heal]{Heal}
  • Nature @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Summon Plant or Fungus]{Summon Plant or Fungus}
  • Occultism @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Object Reading]{Object Reading}
  • Performance @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Enthrall]{Enthrall}
  • Religion @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Bless]{Bless}
  • Society @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Mindlink]{Mindlink}
  • Stealth @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Invisibility]{Invisibility}
  • Survival @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Endure Elements]{Endure Elements}
  • Thievery @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Knock]{Knock}
  • 4th The spell can be up to 1st level
  • 6th The spell can be up to 2nd level
  • 8th The spell can be up to 3rd level
  • 10th The spell can be up to 4th level
  • 12th The spell can be up to 5th level
  • 14th The spell can be up to 6th level
  • 16th The spell can be up to 7th level
  • 18th The spell can be up to 8th level
  • 20th The spell can be up to 9th level

Strength.name: 力量 Strength
Strength.text:
魔法

变化

类型 技能物品（运动）

部件 该生物必须将力量作为其最高或第二高的能力调整值

效果 你将凶猛的力量灌注进该物品。

  • 8级 该物品每天一次可以施放@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Earthbind]{Earthbind}作为一环原初法术，因为你把一名敌人拖拽到地面上
  • 14级 该物品可以每小时一次施放earthbind，而非每天一次
  • 17级 当你投入该物品时，你要么将你的力量属性值提高2，要么将其提高到18，以能让你获得更高属性值者为准。该物品获得巅峰（特征）特征
  • 20级 该物品可以每分钟一次施放earthbind，而非每小时一次

Magical

Transmutation

Type Skill Item (Athletics)

Parts The creature must have Strength as its highest or second- highest ability modifier

Effect You imbue the item with ferocious strength.

  • 8th The item can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Earthbind]{Earthbind} once per day as a primal spell, as you drag a foe down to the ground
  • 14th The item can cast earthbind once per hour instead of once per day
  • 17th When you invest the item, you either increase your Strength score by 2 or increase it to 18, whichever would give you a higher score. The item gains the apex trait
  • 20th The item can cast earthbind once per minute instead of once per hour

Sturdy.name: 坚固 Sturdy
Sturdy.text:
防护

魔法

类型 盾牌

部件 该怪物必须具有硬度、对物理（伤害类型）的抗力，或对三种物理（伤害类型）之一的抗力（钝击、穿刺或挥砍伤害）。在某些情况下，你和GM可能会共同决定：由于该怪物是无定形或气态而具有对物理（伤害类型）的抗力时，它并不能提供合适的部件。

效果 你灌注该盾牌，使其比其他盾牌更为坚固。具有坚固灌注属性的盾牌比其他盾牌更为耐用。只要该灌注属性的等级等于它所灌注之盾牌的物品等级，就将该盾牌的硬度提高3，生命值提高18，破损阈值提高9；灌注属性的等级每比盾牌的物品等级低1级，就将上述提高的硬度减少1、提高的生命值减少6、提高的破损阈值减少3；若灌注属性比盾牌的物品等级低3级或更多，则上述提高最少降至0。若这使盾牌的硬度至少提高1，则此外将盾牌的生命值按每点硬度再提高2，并将盾牌的破损阈值按每点硬度再提高1。

Abjuration

Magical

Type Shield

Parts The monster must have Hardness, resistance to physical damage, or resistance to one of the three physical damage types (bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage). In some cases, you and the GM might decide together that a monster with resistance to physical damage because it is amorphous or gaseous doesn't provide appropriate parts.

Effect You imbue the shield to make it even hardier than other shields. A shield with a sturdy imbued property is hardier than other shields. As long as this imbued property’s level is equal to the item level of the shield it imbues, increase the shield’s Hardness by 3 , Hit Points by 18, and Broken Threshold by 9; for each level the imbued property is below the shield’s item level, reduce this increased Hardness by 1, the increased Hit Points by 6, and the increased Broken Threshold by 3, to a minimum of 0 if the imbued property is 3 or more levels lower than the shield’s item level. If this increases the shield’s Hardness by at least 1, additionally increase the shield’s Hit Points by 2 per Hardness, and the shield’s Broken Threshold by 1 per Hardness.

Wild.name: 野性 Wild
Wild.text:
塑能

魔法

类型 武器

部件 没有需求；你可以使用任何部件。

效果 有时你就是找不到足够多同一类型的部件来恰当地灌注你的武器，但你仍想给它灌注一些东西。源于这种绝望以及将截然不同的部件胡乱灌注在一起，一种狂野的灌注属性诞生了：它不稳定，并且缺少其他灌注属性的一些益处。

路径 蛮力

  • 4级 用该武器进行的打击造成额外1点伤害。每当你造成伤害时，掷骰1d6：若为1，该武器造成酸蚀伤害；若为2，造成寒冷伤害；若为3，造成电击伤害；若为4，造成火焰伤害；若为5，造成负能量伤害；最后，若为6，造成音波伤害
  • 6级 额外伤害提升至1d4
  • 8级 额外伤害提升至1d6
  • 12级 此灌注属性造成的伤害无视抗力
  • 18级 额外伤害提升至1d8
  • 20级 以该武器成功进行一次打击时，在应用额外伤害之前，目标对该伤害类型获得弱点1，持续至你下个回合开始

Evocation

Magical

Type Weapon

Parts There are no requirements; you can use any parts.

Effect Sometimes you just can't find enough parts of the same type to properly imbue your weapon, but you still want to imbue it with something. From that desperation and the haphazard imbuing of wildly different parts, a wild imbued property is born, inconsistent and lacking a few of the benefits of other imbued properties.

Path Might

  • 4th Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional damage. Each time you deal damage, roll 1d6: On a 1, the weapon deals acid damage. On a 2, it deals cold damage. On a 3, it deals electricity damage. On a 4, it deals fire damage. On a 5, it deals negative damage. Finally, on a 6, it deals sonic damage
  • 6th The additional damage increases to 1d4
  • 8th The additional damage increases to 1d6
  • 12th The damage dealt by this imbued property ignores resistances
  • 18th The additional damage increases to 1d8
  • 20th On a successful Strike with the weapon, before applying the additional damage, the target gains weakness 1 to that damage type until the beginning of your next turn

Winged.name: 翼生 Winged
Winged.text:
魔法

变化系

类型 护甲

部件 该怪物必须具有飞行速度。

效果 你为护甲灌注羽翼，它们从护甲背部伸出。你首次灌注护甲时，选择所授予的法术为奥术或原初之一。

  • 6级 当你坠落时，护甲会自动对你施放@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Feather Fall]{Feather Fall}，此增益在接下来1小时内无法再次触发
  • 8级 在feather fall之后，此增益无法触发的时间改为10分钟而非1小时
  • 10级 护甲每天可以对你施放一次@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.cS9nfDRGD83bNU1p]{Fly}
  • 14级 护甲可以每小时对你施放一次fly，而非每天一次
  • 16级 你可以选择让护甲对你施放7级的fly，而非4级的fly。若你如此做，你在接下来1天内无法再次使用护甲的fly法术，而非1小时
  • 18级 你可以持续fly，其速度等于你的陆地速度
  • 20级 护甲可以每小时对一名盟友施放一次4级的fly

Magical

Transmutation

Type Armor

Parts The monster must have a fly Speed.

Effect You imbue the armor with wings, which protrude from the armor's back. Choose when you first imbue the armor for the granted spells to be either arcane or primal.

  • 6th The armor casts @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Feather Fall]{Feather Fall} on you automatically when you fall, this benefit can't trigger again for 1 hour
  • 8th After feather fall, the benefit can't trigger for 10 minutes instead of 1 hour
  • 10th The armor can cast @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.cS9nfDRGD83bNU1p]{Fly} on you once per day
  • 14th The armor can cast fly on you once per hour instead of once per day
  • 16th You can choose to have armor cast 7th-level fly on you instead of 4th-level fly. If you do, you can't use the armor's fly spell again for 1 day, instead of 1 hour
  • 18th You can fly constantly, with a Speed equal to your land Speed
  • 20th The armor can cast 4th-level fly on an ally once per hour

Wisdom.name: 感知 Wisdom
Wisdom.text:
预言

魔法

类型 察觉物品或技能物品（基于感知的技能）

组件 该生物必须将感知作为其最高或第二高的能力调整值

  • 8级 该物品每天可以施放一次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Augury]{占兆术}，作为神圣法术，因为你凭借自身直觉而非外部来源明智地推演未来
  • 14级 该物品的占兆术只需以单动作启动即可施放
  • 17级 当你注入该物品时，你要么将你的感知值提高2点，要么将其提高至18，以能使你获得更高数值者为准。该物品获得巅峰（特征）
  • 20级 你可以选择让该物品每天施放一次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.qsNeG9KZpODSACMq]{预知术}来替代占兆术

Divination

Magical

Type Perception Item or Skill Item (Wisdom-based skill)

Parts The creature must have Wisdom as its highest or second-highest ability modifier

Effect You imbue the item with sagacious wisdom.

  • 8th The item can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Augury]{Augury} once per day as a divine spell, as you wisely deduce the future through your own instincts rather than an external source
  • 14th The item's augury only takes you a single action activation to cast
